raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Badly crowded after start, settled in rear of mid-field, switched wide for clear run 350m out, ran on well but no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後嚴重受擠迫，居中間之後位置。三百五十米處移出外疊以望空。走勢良佳，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W2W) Bumped leaving stalls, rail position in rear of mid-field, good headway halfway out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W2W) 出閘時與對手互相碰撞，居中間之後位置，走內欄。半程時以佳勢上前。走勢強勁，一百五十米處取得領先。其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Crowded start, raced 2 wide towards rear, angled out 350M, 7 to 8 lengths back turning in, made some progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 起步時受擠迫，居後列，走第二疊。三百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後七至八個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, wider turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約三個馬位，走第二疊。入直路時走較外疊。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (3W1W3W) Bumped shortly after start, taken back to race at tail, 7 lengths or so back, very wide turning in, stumbled near 350M, made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Sustained a laceration to its right front fetlock.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a laceration to its right front fetlock.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(3W1W3W) 起步後不久被碰撞，留居包尾位置，落後約七個馬位。入直路時走大外疊。接近三百五十米處時失蹄。直路上毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）
（右前球節割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, no clear run until final 100M, made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自最外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至一百米處。其後未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W4W) Sat last 3 wide, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W4W) 居包尾位置，走第三疊。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Slowly away, rail position in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居中間位置，走內欄。直路初受催策。在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W2W) Commenced well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, travelled well to turn, challenged the leader after turning in, hit the front 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前走勢良佳。入直路後挑戰領放馬。一百米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，掄元。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Average to begin, raced 3 wide in midfield, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 出閘一般，居中間位置，走第三疊，沿途沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Bumped shortly after start, raced better than midfield but trapped 3 wide, travelled keenly, moved closer after passing 700M, no cover throughout, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 起步後不久與對手互相碰撞，居中間之前位置，但走第三疊，搶口。跑過七百米處後追近。沿途沒有遮擋。直路初略為追前。一百米處未能再增速。保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Commenced well, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened inside final furlong.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時並排領先。三百米處未能再增速及被超越。最後二百米轉弱。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Bumped start, raced prominently early, positioned 1 out 1 back in the middle stages, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W2W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，早段居前列。中段居第二疊第二位。直路初在催策下反應平平。最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Pressed leader, ridden and briefly tight for room top of home straight, bumped close home and lost third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 追迫領放馬。直路初受催策，一度受緊迫。接近終點時發生碰撞，失去季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Started fast but unable to hold position, checked and back into mid-field halfway, one paced under pressure, checked briefly 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，但未能保持位置。半程時勒避，墮居中間位置。在催策下保持同速。二百米處一度勒避。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide slightly better than midfield, similar position on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘一般，居中間稍前位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat on pace on the rail, closed off nicely until checked at the 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居前列，走內欄。衝刺良佳，五十米處勒避。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Jumped awkwardly, sat handy, switched out rounding the Turn, made some ground when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙，居前列。轉直路彎時向外移出。在催策下略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W2W2W) Began awkwardly from gate 12, raced 3 wide with no cover in midfield, found a 2 wide spot approaching 700M, 3-1/2L back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W2W2W) 自第十二檔出閘笨拙，居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。趨近七百米處時走第二疊。入直路時落後三個半馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Began awkwardly and made contact, raced 2 wide in midfield, difficult to settle in the middle stages, angled out 400M, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘笨拙及發生觸碰，居中間位置，走第二疊。中段難以穩定走勢。四百米處向外移出。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Began only fairly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on evenly early in straight, weakened final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初保持穩勢。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Jumped with them, raced behind midfield, nearer to the middle track, failed to make any progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;與對手同步躍出，居中間之後位置，靠近跑道中央競跑。最後四百米未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Taken back from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the middle track, made no progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;自第一檔出閘，留居中間之後位置，在跑道中央競跑。最後四百米毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Jumped only fairly, raced in midfield on the middle track, hard ridden from 300M but showed no response, weakened inside final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，在跑道中央競跑。自三百米處起受力策，但毫無反應。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Began well from gate 14, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the stands' rail, no clear run final 400M, not able to test properly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;自第十四檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走外欄。最後四百米未能望空。未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Waited with towards rear, unable to secure clear run until final 150m, ran on well but out of time.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居後列，留力候上。未能望空直至一百五十米處。以佳勢上前，但為時已晚。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Mid-field, switched off rail 300m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置。三百米處移離外欄，保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 出閘普通，受催策上前取得領先。入直路時領先四分三個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速，被超越，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Held up in rear, pushed along over 400m out, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 留居後列。四百米處受推策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W3W) Settled handy, traveled wide, weakened passing 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W3W) 居前列，走外疊。跑過二百米處時轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled in front of midfield, traveled fairly, disappointed for clear running, not fully tested.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前位置。走勢普通。未能望空，因而未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Well there, forced to check on rail turning into back straight, chased leaders in 4th to home turn, fought on steadily without troubling the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 居好位。轉入對面直路時被迫勒避，走內欄。直路彎前居第四位，追趕領先馬匹。持續力拼，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped fairly from the one draw but soon took up running attempting to make all, headed narrowly upon straightening for home but fought on steadily to just clinch a placing.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘一般，但瞬即取得領先，嘗試一放到底。入直路時被超越，落後短距離，但其後持續力拼，僅保住季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Taken back to race 3 wide with cover behind midfield, angled out 500M, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 留居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。五百米處向外移出。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Raced in rear, under pressure 800m out, pushed along wide into home straight, passed a few tiring rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 居後列。八百米處受催策。入直路時受推策，走外疊。末段超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W5W) In rear, headway wide on bend, flattened out early in home straight, no extra and lost ground final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W5W) 居後列。直路彎沿外疊追前。直路早段洩氣。最後一百五十米再無餘力及失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, forced to steady on heels 700m out, effort 450m out, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處被迫收慢避開對手的後蹄。四百五十米處受催策，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘，留居包尾位置，落後八個馬位。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上移出外疊，追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (3W2W2W) Jumped awkwardly losing ground, 3-wide in 2L 4TH early in back straight improving to 1L back 2-wide 700M out, faded gradually under pressure inside final 200M.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘笨拙及失地。對面直路初居第四位，落後兩個馬位，走第三疊。七百米處推進，落後一個馬位，走第二疊。最後二百米在催策下逐漸力竭。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, ridden from top of home straight, strong run to lead 100m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。自直路初起受催策，衝刺強勁，一百米處取得領先，其後保持帶頭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Raced 4 wide behind midfield early. Not much progress in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 早段於馬群中間之後四疊位置競跑。直路上進展不大。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, taken wider 500m out, ridden top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。五百米處被帶出較外疊。直路初受催策，未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Taken back from gate 12, raced at rear on the inside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, ridden along to hold position 700m out, good headway up rail final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。七百米處受催策以保持位置。最後二百米沿欄追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Lacked early pace and had to settle further back in the field along the outside fence, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段欠缺前速，居後列，走外欄。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Tracked pace, challenged 200m out, soon hung right, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。二百米處展開挑戰。瞬即內閃。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, saved ground in the home turn, lay out near 150M, stay on ok.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎走內欄節省腳程。接近一百五十米處時外閃，走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W1W1W) Showed good speed to across, headed 250m out, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，切入內疊。二百五十米處被超越。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Fast; (5W2W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently on the outside, peaked on run near 400M, weakened early in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
快步速;(5W2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，居前列，走外疊。接近四百米處時未能再增速。直路初轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 起步時發生觸碰，受催策上前領放。直路彎前走勢良佳。直路上保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked 400m out, headed by rivals 100m out, faded final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速以領放。四百米處加速。一百米處被對手超越。最後一百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W) Prominent, outpaced and dropped to rear halfway, clear run 200m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W) 居前列。未能跟上步速，半程時墮居後列。二百米處望空。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W1W1W) Sat off pace, limited response in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W1W1W) 居領放馬之後。直路上對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Ridden along to lead, traveled okay, slightly weakened over the final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 受催策，取得領先，走勢不俗。最後一百五十米略為轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Slowly away, raced towards rear on the inside, 6 lengths back turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後六個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Sat towards the rear, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 居後列。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W) Slowly away, raced behind midfield on the inside, wider turning in, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置，走內疊。入直路時走較外疊。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Sat last on the rail, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居包尾位置，走內欄。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W) Crowded leaving stalls, in rear, pushed along from top of home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘後受擠迫，居後列。自直路初起受推策。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Moderately away from a wide draw, raced in midfield on outer, 3 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced behind midfield on outer, travelled keenly throughout, 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自外檔出閘後留後，居中間之後位置，走外疊，沿途搶口。直路彎落後六個馬位。直路上衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 100M, weakened gradually close home, finished 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生觸碰，受催策上前領先。入直路時領先一個半馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速，被超越。接近終點時逐漸轉弱。跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Showed speed to lead, pressed in front, headed by winner 300m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 展現前速以領放，受追迫。三百米處被頭馬超越，最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 wide turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘稍慢，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時走第三疊。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped only fairly, positioned a length behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, hard ridden early in straight, checked near 200M, peaked 100M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，落後領放馬一個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初受力策。接近二百米處時勒避。一百米處未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased leader out wide, short-lived challenge top of home straight, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬，走外疊。直路早段一度發力展開挑戰。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1-1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先一又四分一個馬位。直路初保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速及被超越。最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made running, headed 250m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;帶頭競跑。二百五十米處被超越。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped shortly after start, three wide in mid-field, checked and blundered 900m out, wide into home straight, eased off.
(Roarer again and sustained an abrasion to its left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Roarer again and sustained an abrasion to its left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W4W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。九百米處勒避及失蹄。入直路時走外疊。末段收慢。
（再次患有喘鳴症及左前腿擦傷。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （再次患有喘鳴症及左前腿擦傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W3W) Tracked leaders, switched 400m out, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處轉換跑線。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Settled midfield, traveled okay, made steady progress late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走勢尚可。末段穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept on well in straight to take 2nd, not quite able to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎前走勢輕鬆。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲亞軍，但未能展開真正挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, keen early, unable to pick up for pressure from 500m out, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領放馬，早段搶口。自五百米處起受催策，但未能增速。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Settled behind midfield 3 wide, unable to quicken.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。末段未能加速。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in mid-field, pushed along into home straight, stayed on well but no threat to winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間位置。入直路時受推策。保持佳勢，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Jumped well from gate 11, raced better than midfield on the outside, 3Ls back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自第十一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走外疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。末段衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Tracked leaders, unable to pick up for pressure from 450m out, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。自四百五十米處起受催策，未能加速。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W3W) Away with them, raced 3 wide with no cover, a length or so back, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W3W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約一個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W2W) Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。沿途走內疊節省腳程。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, struggled to hold position on bend, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎難以保持位置。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed good response early in straight, took the lead 200M, peaked and headed 100M, weakened close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 起步後不久碰撞他駒，緊隨領放馬，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段對催策反應良佳。二百米處取得領先。一百米處未能再增速，被超越。接近終點時轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (4W2W2W) Jumped with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide, 3/4L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final 150M.
(Blood at mouth.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(4W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，受催策上前，居前列，走第二疊。入直路時落後四分三馬位。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。
（口部有血。）

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Box seat, well placed into home straight, bumped and lost balance 300m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居包廂位置。入直路時居好位。三百米處被碰撞，失去平衡。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W2W2W) Allowed to stride on and take narrow lead before halfway, headed 200m out, faded.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 獲許展步上前，半程前領先短距離。二百米處被超越，力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W1W1W1W) Jumped well and led on the rail, closed off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，沿欄領放。末段衝刺強勁，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very fast; (4W2W1W1W) Wide early, sent forward and led after 500m, headed over 200m out, soon weakened.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極快步速;(4W2W1W1W) 早段走外疊。受催策上前，跑了五百米後領放。二百米處被超越，瞬即轉弱。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, could not be quickened in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢一般。直路上未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W2W) Across to press leader, ridden 600m out to chase leader, briefly bumped 250m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 切入追迫領放馬。六百米處受催策以追趕領放馬。二百五十米處一度被碰撞。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) From a wide barrier given a conservative ride in the early stages, had plenty to do top of the straight but couldn't go on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘，早段留後競跑。直路初落後頗遠，但未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, pressed on final bend and two lengths clear top of home straight, reeled in and headed 50m out, clear of remainder.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 帶頭競跑。直路彎受催策，直路初領先兩個馬位。其後逐漸被追近，五十米處被超越，但仍拋離其他對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W5W) Crowded at start, dropped out from wide draw, held up last, pushed along widest into home straight, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W5W) 自外檔起步時受擠迫，墮居包尾位置。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Moderately away, raced slightly better than midfield on the outside, peaked 500M, weakened early in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘普通，居中間稍前位置，走外疊。五百米處未能再增速。直路初轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W4W) Mid division, checked 1000m out, keen 600m out, bumped and lost balance 500m out, gave ground final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。一千米處勒避。六百米處搶口。五百米處發生碰撞及失去平衡。最後二百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W3W) Taken back to race 2 wide behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 150M. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W3W) 留居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Out in line, trapped wide in midfield, no cover for the majority of the race, peaked early in straight, weakened final 300M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊，大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速。最後三百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (5W3W3W) Away with them, raced in midfield on the outside, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(5W3W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W4W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out after passing 550M, very wide turning in, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W4W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。跑過五百五十米處後向外移出。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat last, never in contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居包尾位置。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, struggled to hold position from 500m out, well held from 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。自五百米處起難以保持位置。自三百米處起落後甚遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W3W) Settled behind midfield, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居中間之後位置。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Waited with in rear, dropped to last place 750m out and soon ridden, passed a few tiring rivals in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。七百五十米處墮居包尾位置，瞬即受催策。直路上超越數匹漸呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Settled well behind from the widest barrier, came under pressure to challenge just inside the 400m saving ground on rail turning in for home, ran on under pressure despite interrupted runs in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後遙居於後。跑過四百米處後在催策下展開挑戰。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。直路上儘管受阻礙，但在催策下上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, finished off well to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，落後約五個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。衝刺良佳，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Well there early before taken over 3L back in 5th on rail, lost position when tempo increased over 800M out, saved ground turning in for home but soon weakened in straight.
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 早段居好位，其後留居第五位，落後逾三個馬位，走內欄。八百米處在步速加快之際失位。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程，但直路上瞬即轉弱。
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) From draw 1 settled back in midfield, made steady progress from 300M, no clear run 150M and not fully tested over final 100M. Could finish closer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，留居中間位置。自三百米處起穩步追前。一百五十米處未能望空。最後一百米未能全力施為。本應可跑得更為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, effort 550m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，緊隨領先馬匹。五百五十米處受催策。最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W3W) Sat worse than midfield, traveled nicely, made good progress when placed under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走勢良佳。在催策下追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (4W2W2W) Raced in rear, outpaced early stages, plenty to do in home straight, switched inside for clear run 150m out, ran on well to pass plenty of field.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(4W2W2W) 早段未能跟上步速，居後列。直路上落後甚遠。一百五十米處移入內疊以望空。以佳勢上前，超越多駒。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, reserved at the rear 7-8Ls off leader, kept to inside turning for home but lacked a finishing response.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，留居後列，落後領放馬七至八個馬位。轉入直路保持走內疊，但在催策下衝刺乏力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Came back from the wide draw and raced 3 wide with cover, slowly angling out to establish a run 700m out, unable to step up a gear and finished last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 自外檔出閘後留後，走第三疊，有遮擋。逐漸向外移出，七百米處確立跑線。末段未能加速。包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Sat last 2 wide, showed some dash top of the Straight, nothing extra final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居包尾位置，走第二疊。直路初略為加速上前。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W5W) Made contact at start, raced 2 wide towards rear, very wide turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W5W) 起步時發生觸碰，居後列，走第二疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W3W2W2W) Raced wide, tracked pace, forward move halfway to race outside of leader, unable to stay with that rival, one paced under pressure home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W3W2W2W) 走外疊，跟隨領放馬。半程時上前居領放馬外側競跑，其後未能跟上該駒。直路上在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on in a close finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W1W) 受催策上前領放。在多駒幾乎齊過終點下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Settled handy, traveled nicely, pressed on rounding the Turn, responded well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居前列，走勢良佳。轉直路彎時受催策。末段對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W4W) Three wide in mid-field without cover, ridden to hold position 600m out, shifted out final bend, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W4W) 居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。六百米處在催策下保持位置。直路彎向外斜跑。其後未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W4W) Crowded at start, settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W4W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Away ok and sat slightly worse than midfield 3 wide with cover, stayed at the same pace to the line when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 出閘尚可，居中間稍後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。末段在催策下保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, taken wider on bend, effort 350m out, not beaten far.
(Jockey dropped whip at 200M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎移出更外疊。三百五十米處發力。所負不遠。
（於二百米處騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, no clear run approaching 150M, made no progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後留居包尾位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段追前甚多。趨近一百五十米處時未能望空，其後毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Moderately away, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out 350M, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。三百五十米處向外移出。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, keen middle stages, unable to pick up for pressure from 400m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。中段搶口。自四百米處起受催策，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Settled towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, finished off very well final 400M to go 5th near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居後列，落後領放馬六個馬位。最後四百米衝刺甚佳，接近終點時取得第五名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Sat on pace on the outside rail, weakened final 250M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;居前列，走外欄。最後二百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W5W) Sat near the rear 2 wide, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W5W) 居後列，走第二疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Away on fairly and settled worse than midfield, closed off ok to finish a distant 5th.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置。末段衝刺不俗，取得第五名，但所負頗遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slowly away, held up last, short of room 300m out to 200m out, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，留居包尾位置。三百米處至二百米處之間空位不足。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped leaving stalls, showed good speed to lead, ridden along 250m out, headed by winner 150m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘時發生碰撞，展現甚佳前速以領放。二百五十米處受催策。一百五十米處被頭馬超越。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W4W4W) Wide throughout, mid-field, pushed along and lost place over 400m out, left behind final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W4W4W) 沿途居中間位置，走外疊。四百米處受推策，失位。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled smoothly, closed off well, had every chance (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W1W1W) 在催策下領放，走勢暢順。衝刺良佳，已獲機會盡展所長。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, one pace to the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made no impression. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。毫無表現。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped near 600M, angled out 400M, showed limited response early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近六百米處時發生碰撞。四百米處向外移出。直路初對催策反應平平。一百五十米處未能再增速。其後逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in rear top of home straight, not best of runs in home straight, not fully extended.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。直路初仍居後列。直路上無法完全望空，未能全力施為。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W3W) Mid-division, hung out on bends, lost position 600m out, soon well held, eased.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 居中間位置。直路彎外閃。六百米處失位。瞬即被拋離，收慢。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W2W2W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced better than midfield on the outside early, raced in 2nd after entering the back straight, 1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘普通，早段居中間之前位置，走外疊。進入對面直路後居第二位。轉入直路時落後半個馬位。直路初未能再加速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W2W) Waited with towards rear, not best of runs 400m out to 150m out, made up some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W2W) 居後列，留力候上。四百米處至一百五十米處之間未能完全望空。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W4W) Tracked leaders, pushed along 600m out to chase leaders, taken wider into home straight, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。六百米處受推策以追趕領先馬匹。入直路時移出較外疊，保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Jumped well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide, a length or so back, moved a bit closer after passing 1200M, 2 wide from 1000M, 1/2L back turning in, peaked 300M, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，落後約一個馬位，走第三疊。跑過千二米處後略為追近。自一千米處起走第二疊。入直路時落後半個馬位。三百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Broke well from a poor draw sharing early pace, gradually settled some 1L back in 2nd from 1050M out, renewed effort into straight holding every chance until finding no extra inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，早段並排領先。自一千零五十米處起逐漸居第二位，落後約一個馬位。入直路時重新發力。一度甚具爭勝機會，直至最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W3W) Broke well, settled some 2L back in 3rd on rail, angled out for a run 600M out approaching final turn, hit the front briefly about 300M out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W3W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後約兩個馬位，走內欄。六百米處趨近直路彎時向外移出以取位。約三百米處一度領先，但末段無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘後留居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Sat last, picked off a few weakened rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居包尾位置。末段超越數匹已轉弱的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) In rear, unable to quicken under pressure 300m out, one paced and no real impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居後列。三百米處在催策下未能加速。保持同速，未能構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Slowly away, recovered but towards rear. Pushed along 300m out, no real impression, ran out of room final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後恢復走勢，但居後列。三百米處受推策。無甚表現。最後五十米空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W) Average to begin, settled at the rear, steadied 50m out, failed to run on final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W) 起步普通，居後列。五十米處收慢。末段未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Severely checked when crowded shortly after start and lost ground, outpaced and detached throughout, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 起步後不久在受擠迫之際大力勒避，因而失地。沿途未能跟上步速，被拋離。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, driven along to chase leaders 550m out, stayed on well in home straight, just lost third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 緊隨領先馬匹。五百五十米處受催策以追趕領先馬匹。直路上保持佳勢，僅失去季席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Tracked leader, nudged along from halfway, weakened quickly home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。自半程起受催策。直路上迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Sat at the rear, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後列。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Sat handy, switched out approaching the Turn, failed to respond when asked (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 居前列。趨近直路彎時向外移出。末段在催策下毫無反應。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W4W) Tracked leader, forced wide and lost position bend, stayed on at the one pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W4W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎被迫走外疊及失位。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped out of stalls, three wide in mid-field, struggled to hold position early in home straight, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘後被碰撞，居中間位置，走第三疊。直路早段難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began awkwardly, raced towards rear on the middle track, passed some tired runners final 350M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘笨拙，居後列，在跑道中央競跑。最後三百五十米超越若干已呈疲態的對手。（見競賽事件報告。）

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Mid-field, angled off rail and chased leaders into home straight, responded to pressure to lead closing stages, cosy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置。入直路時移離內欄，追趕領先馬匹。末段對催策交出反應，取得領先。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Settled in mid-field, travelled smoothly to 500m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間位置。五百米處前走勢暢順。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, finished off well to take 2nd, just beaten by a narrow margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第三疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍，僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Mid-field, raced on outside of field, no impression under pressure, dropped away final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置，走外欄。在催策下毫無表現。最後一百五十米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat midfield on the rail, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Sat on pace 2 wide behind the leader, challenged the leader in the early straight, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 跟前競跑，居領放馬之後，走第二疊。直路早段挑戰領放馬。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (5W3W4W) Travelled wide without cover in last few from a poor draw, commenced move out wide rounding home bend and the widest into straight, ran on well down the centre of the track to snatch 3rd late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(5W3W4W) 自外檔出閘，居最後數位之內，走外疊，沒有遮擋。轉直路彎時在外疊開始上前，入直路時走最外疊。末段在跑道中央走勢良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W) Sat in front of midfield 2 wide, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W) 居中間之前位置，走第二疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Bumped after the start, from draw 1 stayed close to leaders along the inside, failed to run on passing 250M, weakened away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔起步後被碰撞，保持緊隨領先馬匹，走內疊。跑過二百五十米處時未能追前。轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped shortly after start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路初未能再增速。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W1W) Sat last, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W1W) 居包尾位置。末段對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled towards the rear, slightly drifted back rounding the home turn, made good late progress final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居後列。轉直路彎時略為墮退。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Tracked leaders, driven along 450m out, hung out final 400m, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領先馬匹。四百五十米處受催策。最後四百米外閃。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Away well, took the early lead, headed 600M, 2nd on turn, peaked 200M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，早段領放。六百米處被超越。直路彎居第二位。二百米處未能再增速。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Showed speed to get across, ridden top of home straight, headed by winner 300m out, dropped away quickly final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 展現前速以切入內疊。直路初受催策。三百米處被頭馬超越。最後二百米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Sat handy, weakened final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;居前列。最後四百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Settled in mid-field, struggled to hold position halfway, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居中間位置。半程時難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Away with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, lay out making the turns in the middle stages, peaked near 500M, 5 lengths back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第三疊。中段轉彎時外閃。接近五百米處時未能再增速。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路初未能再增速。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made running, pressed on entering home straight, closed down final 100m, headed late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 帶頭。進入直路時受催策。最後一百米被追近。末段被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped well, raced prominently, 2 wide, a length or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, weakened final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居前列，走第二疊。入直路時落後約一個馬位。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped nicely and led, weakened final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，取得領先。最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well and led, kept on nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，取得領先。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked pace, struggling to hold position 400m out, weakened.
(Roarer again.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領放馬。四百米處難以保持位置。其後轉弱。
（再次患有喘鳴症。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Missed the start, raced at tail throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;漏閘，沿途居包尾位置。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Jumped awkwardly, settled midfield, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made contact at start, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/4L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed approaching 200M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生觸碰，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先四分一個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢。趨近二百米處時未能再增速，被超越。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Began only fairly, positioned a length behind the leader, 2 away from the stands' rail, peaked 350M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;出閘僅屬一般。落後領放馬一個馬位，走外欄第三疊。三百五十米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped with them, raced prominently on the stands' rail, hard ridden 300M but only showed limited response, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;與對手同步躍出，居前列，走外欄。三百米處受力策，但反應僅屬平平。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, ridden along to press leader, struggled to hold position from 300m out, eased when jockey was concerned about its action.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘時向外斜跑，被碰撞。受催策，追迫領放馬。自三百米處起難以保持位置。騎師對坐騎的動作有疑慮時收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased leader, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Moderately away from the widest draw, raced better than midfield but trapped wide, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 自最外檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，但走外疊，沿途沒有遮擋。直路早段未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leading pair, stuck to task under pressure and never far away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先兩駒。在催策下保持走勢。從未遠離領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Began awkwardly and made contact, taken back to race behind midfield on outer, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made little progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘笨拙，與對手互相觸碰，留居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled on pace 2 wide, kept on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居前列，走第二疊。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Settled in front of midfield, raced wide, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之前位置，走外疊。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Taken back from gate 12, raced in midfield on the outside, moved a bit closer turning in, kept on well in straight to take a place without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 自第十二檔出閘，留居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時略為追近。直路上保持佳勢，取得季軍，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Towards rear, stayed on final 150m, lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居後列。最後一百五十米保持走勢，但速度不足以追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, a length back turning in, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時落後一個馬位。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Sat just behind the leaders 2 wide, weakened and gave ground in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置，走第二疊。直路上轉弱及墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) Began only fairly and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, very wide turning in, showed no response in straight, eased final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 出閘僅屬一般及發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上對催策毫無反應。最後一百米收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Chased leader, weakened passing 250M, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 追趕領放馬。跑過二百五十米處時轉弱。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Bumped out of stalls and lost balance, tracked leaders, ridden along 400m out, weakened final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘時被碰撞，失去平衡，跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處受催策。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Jumped swiftly and cut across to the stands' rail, pressured for the lead throughout the event, run peaked at 200m and weakened gradually.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘迅速，切向外欄。沿途在催策下爭奪領先。二百米處未能再增速，逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Jumped well, raced prominently on the stands' side, 3/4L back at 400M, took the lead approaching final 100M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;出閘迅速，居前列，靠近外欄競跑。四百米處落後四分三個馬位。趨近一百米處時取得領先。保持佳勢至終點，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(-) (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, kept on to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(-)(1W1W) 在催策下帶頭。保持走勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先半個馬位。接近二百米處時未能再增速及被超越。最後一百五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Showed speed to get across, challenged by rivals top of home straight, headed by runner-up 250m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 展現前速以切入內疊。直路初受對手挑戰。二百五十米處被亞軍馬匹超越，最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) In rear after slow start, steadied off heels on occasions, good headway up rail home straight, improving to chase leaders when running out of room closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列，數度收慢避開他駒後蹄。直路上沿欄追前甚多。末段推進上前，追趕領先馬匹，但空位不足。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Prominent, keen early, pushed along 400m out to chase leaders, looked like winner 300m out but weakened final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居前列，早段搶口。四百米處受推策以追趕領先馬匹。三百米處甚具勝望，但最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W1W2W) Prominent early stages, drifted some 3L off the pace about 900M out, in similar position in 5th rounding home bend swinging wide into straight, kept on at the one pace without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W1W2W) 早段居前列。約九百米處墮退，落後領放馬約三個馬位。轉直路彎時居相若的第五位。入直路時移出外疊。保持同速，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; Bumped start, sent forward to take the lead, led by a length at 400M, peaked and headed 250M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Irregular heart rhythm.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;起步時與對手互相碰撞，受催策上前領放。四百米處領先一個馬位。二百五十米處未能再增速及被超越，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（心律不正常。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Sluggish start, raced towards centre of course and rear of mid-field, good progress to lead 300m out but shifting out, unable to sustain final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;出閘緩慢，居中間之後位置，在接近跑道中央競跑。追前甚多，三百米處取得領先，但向外斜跑。最後一百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Mid-field, checked briefly halfway and unable to hold position, left behind in rear final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。半程時一度勒避，未能保持位置。最後二百米被拋離，居後列過終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderate start, recovered swiftly between runners to take up running over 950M out setting a smart pace on home bend, led until tiring 300M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，其後在馬匹之間迅速恢復走勢，九百五十米處取得領先。直路彎以快步速領放。保持領先直至三百米處呈現疲態。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Jumped on terms and settled 3rd towards the middle part of the track, responded only fairly when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;與對手同步躍出，居第三位，在跑道中央競跑。對催策反應僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, led by 3/4L at 400M, peaked and headed 150M, ran on evenly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘普通，受催策上前領先。四百米處領先四分三個馬位。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。保持穩勢至終點。（見競賽事件報告。）

raceinfo_eng.RaceName: EIGHT TO GLORY, Presented by Lenovo

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Settled toward rear, pulled forward slightly before steadied when keen about 950M out, saved ground on the inside turning in for home but did not find much room early in straight until the 200M, one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居後列，其後略為追前。約九百五十米處搶口時收慢。轉入直路時走內疊節省腳程，但直路初空位不足直至二百米處。其後保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W4W) Very slowly away losing considerable ground, recovered steadily to join the rear of the field over 900M out, commenced move angling off the rail 600M out, ran on from 4L 9th into straight to just fail to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W4W) 出閘十分緩慢，失地甚多。其後逐漸恢復走勢，九百米處追上馬群後列。六百米處移離內欄，開始上前。入直路時落後四個馬位，居第九位，其後追前，過終點時僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Slightly slow out, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, moved closer after passing 1200M, no cover from 900M, 1 to 2 lengths back on turn, hard ridden approaching 300M but only showed limited response, weakened gradually final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘稍慢，居中間稍後位置，走第三疊。跑過千二米處後追近。自九百米處起沒有遮擋。直路彎落後一至兩個馬位。趨近三百米處時受力策，但反應僅屬一般。最後五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began only fairly from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, made contact near 600M, same position on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘僅屬一般，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走內疊。接近六百米處時與對手互相觸碰。直路彎居相同位置。直路初保持佳勢。一百米處未能再增速。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Crowded at start and soon taken across at the back for rails run, travelled keenly on heels from the 600M, obtained a clear run switching onto inside 300M out, finished off the race well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 起步時受擠迫，瞬即在馬群之後切入內欄。自六百米處起搶口，緊貼他駒後蹄。三百米處移向內疊以望空。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W6W) Dropped out from wide draw without cover, taken widest into home straight, short-lived effort 300m out, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W6W) 自外檔出閘後墮後，沒有遮擋。入直路時移出最外疊。三百米處一度發力。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide better than midfield, bumped and unbalanced near 1100M, 1 to 2 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。接近千一米處時被碰撞及失去平衡。入直路時落後一至兩個馬位。衝刺平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W2W2W) Commenced well, positioned 3-1/2L behind the leader on the inside, 2 wide from 650M, same margin back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W2W2W) 出閘迅速，落後領放馬三個半馬位，走內疊。自六百五十米處起走第二疊。入直路時落後相同距離。直路上移出外疊，末段衝刺強勁，跑獲亞軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W3W) Sat towards the rear, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W3W) 居後列。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, driven top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 沿欄居中間之後位置。直路初受催策，速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W2W) Dropped back from draw 1 to race in midfield, had over 4Ls to make up 400M but couldn't muster the speed to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自第一檔出閘後墮居中間位置。四百米處落後逾四個馬位。末段未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W2W2W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced at rear on the inside, angled out 450M, 8 to 9 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W2W2W) 自最外檔出閘，留居後列，走內疊。四百五十米處向外移出。入直路時落後八至九個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W1W4W) Rail position in rear of mid-field, switched wide but short of room final bend when trying to improve, clear run 300m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W1W4W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。直路彎在嘗試推進之際移出外疊，但空位不足。三百米處望空。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W2W) Held up last, still in last pair top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 留居包尾位置。直路初仍居最後兩位之內。欠缺速度以展開挑戰。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Began only fairly, ended up racing near last, had some work to do 400M but responded only fairly to pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 出閘僅屬一般，居接近包尾位置。四百米處落後頗遠，但對催策反應僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Soon taken back from a wide barrier, trailed the field from about 1300M out, made modest progress past well-beaten horses in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 自最外檔出閘，瞬即留後。自約千三米處起尾隨馬群。直路上略為追前，超越數匹已洩氣潰敗的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Crowded on jumping, raced at rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, angled out after turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 躍出時受擠迫，居包尾位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後向外移出。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) In rear after sluggish start, under pressure 500m out, switched inside for clear run 350m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 起步緩慢，其後居後列。五百米處受催策。三百五十米處向內移入以望空。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Waited with towards rear, had to wait for run turning into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，留力候上。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Slightly slow out from gate 1, raced behind midfield on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘稍慢，居中間之後位置，走內疊。中段略為追近。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W1W2W) Taken back from the widest draw, raced towards rear, 6 lengths or so back on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W1W2W) 自大外檔出閘後留居後列。直路彎落後約六個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W1W1W) Sat last, held up rounding the Home Turn, closed off nicely between horses.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W1W1W) 居包尾位置。轉直路彎時受困。末段在馬匹之間衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W2W) Settled towards the rear, made little impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居後列。無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Slow into stride and sat midfield the fence, saved ground throughout and travelled to the line okay when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居中間位置，走內欄。沿途走內欄節省腳程。末段在催策下走勢尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W3W2W3W) Crowded shortly after start, raced at rear on the outside, 9 lengths or so back turning in, made some headway in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W3W2W3W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約九個馬位。直路上略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Jumped only fairly, sat worse than midfield, traveled okay, made steady progress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走勢不俗。末段穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled midfield, held up at the Straight, could not be fully ridden out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置。直路上受困，未能被全力催策。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。衝刺良佳，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Sat 3 wide behind midfield, closed off nicely, no threat to top 2.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。末段衝刺良佳，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W) Crowded at start settling in midfield, baulked briefly for a run over 350M out, finished off the race well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間位置。三百五十米處一度受困。末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Settled in front of midfield, not much impression made (See Incident Report).
(Lame in left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間之前位置。無甚表現。（見競賽事件報告。）
（左前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside, 6-1/2L back turning in, made good progress in straight to be nearest on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 起步時向內斜跑及被碰撞，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時落後六個半馬位。直路上追前甚多，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Sat towards rear, responded fairly well under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 居後列。末段對鞭策反應不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, one pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢一般。末段保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, switched for clear run 400m out, ran on well final 200m, closed on winner but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。四百米處轉換跑線以望空。最後二百米保持佳勢。末段追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W4W) Sat midfield 2 wide, made good late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。末段追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W3W4W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, never on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。從未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Shifted in and bumped leaving stalls, in rear, forced to steady on heels 500m out, made up some late ground.
(Respiratory condition.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘時向內斜跑及與對手互相碰撞，居後列。五百米處被迫收慢避開對手的後蹄。末段略為追前。
（異常呼吸狀況。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W3W) Waited with in rear, switched wide 300m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W3W) 居後列，留力候上。三百米處移出外疊，保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W2W) Slightly slow out and bumped, raced towards rear on the inside, 8 lengths or so back, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W2W) 出閘稍慢及與對手互相碰撞，居後列，落後約八個馬位，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上毫無進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W) Slightly slow out and inconvenienced, raced towards rear on the inside, 7 lengths back turning in, made good progress until blocked final 75M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W) 出閘稍慢，受妨礙，居後列，走內疊。入直路時落後七個馬位。末段追前甚多，最後七十五米受困。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Made contact at start, raced 2 wide in midfield, inconvenienced near 900M, 2 to 3 lengths back turning in, not enough room early in straight, cleared 150M, made some progress thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 起步時發生觸碰，居中間位置，走第二疊。接近九百米處時受妨礙。入直路時落後兩至三個馬位。直路初空位不足，一百五十米處望空，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W3W) Away well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, moved closer on turn, showed good response in straight, took the lead 150M, kept on well to the line, just able to hold off the challenger late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎追近。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百五十米處取得領先。保持佳勢至終點。末段僅能力拒對手挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast(+) (1W1W1W2W) Raced in rear, pushed along wide into home straight, strong run to lead final 50m, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速(+)(1W1W1W2W) 居後列。入直路時受推策，走外疊。衝刺強勁，最後五十米取得領先。其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W2W) Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, 8 lengths or so back, same margin back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W2W) 自外檔出閘，留居包尾位置，落後約八個馬位。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Three wide in rear of mid-field, taken wider on bend, stayed on but never going pace to get competitive.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。直路彎移出更外疊。保持走勢，但從未能加速以爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W5W) Commenced well, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W5W) 出閘迅速，居中間位置，落後三至四個馬位，走第二疊。轉入直路時走大外疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Slightly slow out, raced towards rear on the inside, a bit closer in the middle stages, made some progress early in straight, no clear run final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘稍慢，居後列，走內疊。中段略為追近。直路早段略為追前。最後一百米未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W) Emerged as leader passing 1600M, set a good pace to 800M, found little on straightening, soon headed and drifted out of contention.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W) 跑過千六米處時進佔領先位置。八百米處前以甚快步速領放。入直路時無甚餘力，瞬即被超越及墮退，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, settled in front of midfield, lay in in the Straight when under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之前位置。直路上在催策下內閃。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Slowly away then hampered, raced in rear, good run up rail turning into home straight and made headway, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，其後受阻礙，居後列。轉入直路時沿欄望空，追前。最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W4W) Tightened for room after a slow getaway, swooped late despite laying in over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W4W) 出閘緩慢，其後緊迫競跑。儘管末段內閃，仍以佳勢追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Improved steadily to one back 4-wide with cover early stages, 3-wide without cover onto home bend, soon weakened after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 早段持續推進，落後一個馬位，走第四疊，有遮擋。開始轉直路彎時走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路後瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 出閘緩慢，沿途居後列。從未有力一爭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start and unbalanced, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞及失去平衡，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W) Sat midfield 3 wide, angled out in the Straight, just one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路上向外移出。在催策下僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Chased leader, under pressure 550m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 追趕領放馬。五百五十米處受催策。保持佳勢，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slightly slow out, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run until final 50M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘稍慢，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。未能望空直至最後五十米。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) A little awkward away and threw the head about, over-raced in the early and middle stages, momentarily held up at the top of home straight, ran on fairly well when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 出閘略為笨拙，將頭兩邊擺動。早段及中段搶口。直路初一度受困。末段在催策下走勢不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W) Under pressure to press leader, struggled to hold position from 500m out, gave ground final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W) 受催策，追迫領放馬。自五百米處起難以保持位置。最後三百米墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Settled in joint 4th just over 3L off the pace on rail, drifted further back to 5th onto first bend, did not find much room behind runners early in straight, produced good late impression inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 並列第四位，落後領放馬稍逾三個馬位，走內欄。開始轉首個彎位時進一步墮後至第五位。直路早段在對手之後空位不足。最後一百米追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled in forward of midfield in 6th about 3L off the pace on rail, slightly further back rounding home bend but renewed effort upon straightening, fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之前第六位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走內欄。轉直路彎時略為墮退，但入直路時重新發力，在催策下持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Chased leaders, ridden along 350m out, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;追趕領先馬匹。三百五十米處受催策。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; Tracked leaders, unable to hold position halfway, flattened out final 200m.
(Mucus in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;緊隨領先馬匹。半程時未能保持位置。最後二百米洩氣。
（氣管有痰。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; Shared led on the stands' rail, weakened final furlong.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;並排領先，走外欄。最後二百米轉弱。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Sat on pace 3 from the stands' rail, kept on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;居前列，走外欄第四疊。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Disputed led, ridden to chase leader 400m out, ran on well to close on winner late on but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;爭奪領先。四百米處在催策下追趕領放馬。末段以佳勢追近頭馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled some 2L back on rail early stages, drifted further off the pace into 5th inside the 650M, gradually weakened under pressure in straight.
(Bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 早段落後約兩個馬位，走內欄。六百五十米處進一步墮居第五位。直路上在催策下逐漸轉弱。
（流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (3W3W) Settled behind midfield 3 wide with cover, had some difficulty securing clear running in the Straight but ran on well when clear in the final 100M to take third (see Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路上頗為難以望空，但最後一百米望空後走勢良佳，取得季軍。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 受催策上前領放。保持不俗走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to lead, kept on nicely for 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。保持佳勢，跑入亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2-3/4L turning in, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，受催策上前領放。轉入直路時領先二又四分三個馬位。直路上保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat just behind the leaders, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹稍後位置。末段衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Across from wide draw to lead, ridden top of home straight, 1l clear 200m out, headed 100m out, no extra.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，切入帶頭。直路初受催策。二百米處帶離一個馬位。一百米處被超越。其後再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Never far off leaders in 4th place, moved up to 2nd early straight, run ended 200M and faded away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居第四位，從未遠離領先馬匹。直路初進佔第二位。二百米處無以為繼，力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W2W2W) Across from wide draw and pressed leader, weakened from 200m out, lost several places final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W2W2W) 自大外檔出閘後切入，追迫領放馬。自二百米處起轉弱。最後一百米失去數位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Sent forward to lead, kept on until weakened in the final strides. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 受催策上前領放。保持走勢，直至最後數步轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (5W4W) Tracked pace three wide, keen, brief effort early in home straight, soon weakened.
(Lame in left hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(5W4W) 跟隨領放馬，走第三疊。搶口。直路早段一度發力，瞬即轉弱。
（左後腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, no daylight early in straight, made good progress final 200M to take 2nd, no threat to the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路初未能望空。最後二百米追前頗多，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W) Settled on the rail behind the pacemaker, saved ground to turn, kept on one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W) 居領放馬之後，走內欄。直路彎前走內欄節省腳程。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W3W) Out with rest, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off strongly, just beaten by a head, good debut.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上移出外疊。末段衝刺強勁。僅以一馬頭位之差落敗，首戰表現良佳。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PPG, a 3-year-old gelding, by Exceed And Excel from Cottoned On, a daughter of Hard Spun. Horses by the same sire include Ariel and King Miles. This fellow was given ten trials in Hong Kong. In the latest trial, he shared the lead and finished fourth under the whip, beaten by 3-1/4Ls, over 1200m on turf in Conghua on June 26. He will probably need a run.
formguide.comments_chi: 「盡善盡美」(Exceed And Excel)之後，在港同父馬包括「艾莉奧」及「安康萬里」等駒，生母出自「緊密穿梭」(Hard Spun)。抵港後試閘十次。最近6月26日出試從化草地1200米，早段並頭領放，末段鞭策下跑第四名，落後頭馬3.25個馬位。首戰熱身為主。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W2W2W) Sat handy, switched out rounding the Turn, made good ground under whip.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W2W2W) 居前列。轉直路彎時向外移出。在鞭策下追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W4W4W) Bumped exiting stalls, raced very wide throughout without cover, driven 500m out, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W4W4W) 出閘時發生碰撞，沿途走大外疊，沒有遮擋。五百米處受催策。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W4W) Shifted out at start, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W4W) 起步時向外斜跑，居中間之後位置，走外疊。轉入直路時走大外疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Three wide in mid-field, driven along top of home straight, no headway.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置，走第三疊。直路初受催策。未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W) Bumped start and unbalanced, sent forward to race prominently, allowed rival to cross near 550M, 1-1/2L back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W) 起步時發生碰撞及失去平衡，受催策上前，居前列。接近五百五十米處時讓對手過頭。入直路時落後一個半馬位。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W) Tracked pace out wide without cover, challenged leaders 300m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。三百米處挑戰領先馬匹。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W3W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced 2 wide in midfield, angled out approaching 400M, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W3W) 起步時向內斜跑及發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。趨近四百米處時向外移出。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W2W) Began only fairly, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, showed some response early in straight, made contact 200M, steadied near 100M and 50M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎略為追近。直路早段對催策略有反應。二百米處發生觸碰。接近一百米處及五十米處時兩度收慢。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Jumped awkwardly, sat midfield, briefly held up in the Straight, closed off okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置。直路上一度受困。末段衝刺尚可。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Box seat, driven along to chase leader 550m out, challenged and every chance from 400m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居包廂位置。五百五十米處在催策下追趕領放馬。自四百米處起展開挑戰，已獲機會盡展所長。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Raced prominently, brief effort 300m out, weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 居前列。三百米處一度發力。其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Well there, chased leader around home bend and into straight, faded gradually.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 早段居好位。轉直路彎及入直路時追迫領放馬。逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Tracked leader against inside rail, stayed on rail when challenging 200m out, stayed on well to get on top final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。保持走內欄，二百米處展開挑戰。保持佳勢，最後五十米取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Disputed lead, faded final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 爭奪領先。最後三百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Began only fairly, raced towards rear on the stands' rail, passed some tired runners final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，居後列，走外欄。最後四百米超越數匹已呈疲態的對手。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Crowded shortly after the start, raced rear division of mid-field 3 wide with cover, finished off just fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。末段衝刺僅屬一般。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W) Tracked leader, three wide, effort over 300m out, no extra and lost ground final 250m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W) 跟隨領放馬，走第三疊。三百米處發力上前。最後二百五十米再無餘力，墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W4W) Settled behind midfield 2 wide, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Held up in last pair, stayed on final 200m, never a threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 留居最後兩位之內。最後二百米保持走勢。從未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, ran on well to move into third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。以佳勢上前，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W2W3W) Prominent 4-wide before taken one-out-one-back for cover 700M out, came to challenge entering straight but had nothing to give.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W2W3W) 居前列，走第四疊。七百米處居第二疊第二位以取得遮擋。入直路時上前展開挑戰，但再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Slow; (3W3W5W) Jumped with them, travelling 3 wide no cover throughout, kept on ok considering the circumstances (See Incident Report).
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
慢步速;(3W3W5W) 與對手同步躍出，沿途走第三疊，沒有遮擋。在如此形勢下保持尚可走勢。（見競賽事件報告。）
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (3W3W4W) Taken back to last few from a poor draw, commenced move rounding home bend and one of the widest into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(3W3W4W) 自外檔出閘後留居最後數位之內。轉直路彎時開始上前。入直路時走最外疊的馬匹之一。保持佳勢，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow(-) (3W2W4W) In touch with leaders, improving to challenge when bumped by runner-up 200m out, ran on well.
(Blood in trachea.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速(-)(3W2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。二百米處在推進以展開挑戰時被亞軍馬匹碰撞。其後走勢良佳。
（氣管有血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W3W) Held up in last pair, stayed on late, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 留居最後兩位之內。末段保持走勢。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Towards rear, kept to inside and made inroads from 350m out, staying on but not threatening to reach leaders when running out of room final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 居後列。自三百五十米處起保持沿內疊上前。保持走勢，但最後五十米空位不足時未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W2W) Sat behind midfield on the rail, made good late ground along the rail.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。末段沿欄追前甚多。
