runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W1W) Sat rear, traveled nicely, responded well under whip (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W1W) 居後列，走勢良佳。對鞭策反應良佳。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W4W) Moderately away, pushed along early stages to hold midfield position, wide turning in, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W4W) 出閘普通，早段受推策以保持居中間位置。入直路時走外疊，保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W1W1W) Towards rear of mid-field, troubled passage when looking to improve towards rail over 200m out, stayed on once clear final 100m, took third close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W1W1W) 居中間之後位置。二百米處嘗試靠近內欄推進時遇上阻滯，最後一百米望空後隨即保持走勢。接近終點時跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W4W) Settled towards the rear 2 wide, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W4W) 居後列，走第二疊，保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W) Bumped start, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, 3-1/2L back, same margin back on turn, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W) 起步時被碰撞，居中間稍後位置，落後三個半馬位，走第三疊。直路彎落後相同距離。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat worse than midfield, traveled fairly, limited response when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走勢一般。對催策反應平平。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Slowly away, rail position in mid-field, under pressure 500m out, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居中間位置，走內欄。五百米處受催策，速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Raced wide towards rear, struggling and left behind final 300m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 居後列，走外疊。最後三百米掙扎上前，被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Sat midfield on the rail, made some late ground.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W) Mid-field, pushed along to make ground 400m out, sustained run but lacked pace to reach winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W) 居中間位置。四百米處在推策下追前。持續追前，但缺乏速度，未能追及頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Average to begin, raced slightly behind midfield, saved ground on turn, angled out early in straight, finished off evenly.
(Sustained an abrasion to left hind leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained an abrasion to left hind leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘普通，居中間稍後位置。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初向外移出。衝刺平穩。
（左後腿擦傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Shifted in at start and bumped, raced behind midfield on the outside, very wide turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，與對手互相碰撞，居中間之後位置，走外疊。入直路時走大外疊。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W) Raced wide in mid-field, stayed on final 200m, unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。最後二百米保持走勢，未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Raced wide in mid-field, some headway under pressure 200m out, flattening out when hampered 50m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 居中間位置，走外疊。二百米處在催策下略為追前。五十米處受阻礙之際洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in worse than midfield, in similar position into home straight, briefly baulked over 200M out, ran home one-paced without quickening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時居相若位置。二百米處一度受困。末段保持同速，未能增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Tracked pace, no extra and lost ground final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。最後一百五十米再無餘力及失地。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Made contact at start, raced towards rear on the stands' side, hard ridden from 400M but showed no response, eased final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;起步時發生觸碰，居後列，靠近外欄競跑。自四百米處起受力策，但毫無反應。最後一百五十米收慢。

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, ran on ordinarily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。走勢普通。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) Raced in touch, clear run up inside rail from top of home straight, good headway to lead under 100m out, comfortably on top closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 緊隨領先馬匹。自直路初起沿內欄望空。以佳勢追前，一百米處取得領先。末段輕鬆取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, ridden along halfway to hold position, pushed along wide into home straight, ran on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W3W) 居中間位置。半程時受催策以保持位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。末段以佳勢上前，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W2W) Rear of mid-field, a bit outpaced 350m out, warmed to task and staying on when running out of room behind leaders final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。三百五十米處被略為拋離。加速上前，最後五十米在領先馬匹之後空位不足時保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Quickly into stride, sat right behind the leader on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，緊隨領放馬，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。入直路後保持走內疊。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) Tracked pace out wide, ridden top of home straight, faded final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領放馬，走外疊。直路初受催策。最後二百米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W3W) Began well from the widest draw travelling 3-wide without cover in 4th or 3rd within 2L of pace, held every chance upon straightening but unable to sustain effort inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W3W) 自大外檔出閘迅速，居第三或第四位，落後領放馬不逾兩個馬位，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時一度甚具爭勝機會，但最後一百五十米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Away only fairly from the middle of the line, recovered to be midfield one off, held up briefly at the home turn, travelled to the line ok (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 自中檔出閘僅屬一般，其後恢復走勢，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎一度受困。末段走勢尚可。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (4W3W3W) Settled in rear 3-wide from the widest barrier, commenced move and wider rounding home bend, finished off the race well inside final 150M, did best work late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(4W3W3W) 自最外檔出閘，居後列，走第三疊。轉直路彎時開始上前，走更外疊。最後一百五十米衝刺良佳。末段表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Raced in touch with leaders, caught in a pocket behind front two against rail when trying to challenge 150m out, switched 100m out, ran on well and still closing at line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹。一百五十米處嘗試沿欄展開挑戰時在頭兩名馬匹之後坐包廂。一百米處轉換跑線。末段以佳勢追前，過終點時仍持續追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Caught racing 3-wide without cover towards the tail of the field, couldn't muster the pace to challenge on straightening. (Jockey fined for failing to ride out to the end of the race to the satisfaction of the Stewards.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 居尾列，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時未能加速以展開挑戰。（騎師因未有力策坐騎至終點，表現未能令小組滿意而被罰款。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Jumped only fairly, raced keenly in the early and middle stages and refused to settle, couldn't quicken enough in the straight, no extra final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘僅屬一般。早段及中段搶口，不願穩定走勢。直路上加速不足。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W3W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, tracked pace out wide without cover, quickly lost place early in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W3W) 出閘時向內斜跑，與對手互相碰撞。跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路早段迅速失位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Bumped leaving stalls, three wide in rear of mid-field, raced keenly throughout, shifted out when steadied 600m out, lost touch final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 起步時發生碰撞，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沿途搶口。六百米處收慢時向外斜跑。最後二百米被拋離。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Sat towards rear, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居後列。走勢尚可。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W3W) Jumped with the field, settled slightly worse than midfield, improved around the field 450M out, stayed on well to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間稍後位置。四百五十米處繞過馬群上前。末段保持佳勢，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, good headway final bend, sustained headway to challenge 200m out, no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎追前甚多。持續上前，二百米處展開挑戰，但不敵頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Away well, raced 2 wide in 2nd, 3/4L back turning in, kept on same pace in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。入直路時落後四分三個馬位。直路上保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W2W3W) Soon taken back behind midfield in 9th from a wide barrier, did not find much room in home straight racing in a tight run inside final 100M, did best work late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W2W3W) 自外檔出閘後瞬即留居中間之後第九位。直路上空位不足，最後一百米緊迫競跑。末段表現最佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Broke well but soon taken back to 5th just over 2L off the pace, shifted wider for a run entering straight but unable to quicken to challenge under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，但瞬即留居第五位，落後領放馬稍逾兩個馬位。入直路時移出較外疊以取位，但在催策下未能加速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Mid-field, under pressure turning into home straight, one paced and never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。轉入直路時受催策。保持同速，從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W2W) From a wide draw shifted across behind runners to the rail, raced ungenerously early stages, badly held up rounding the home bend, flashed home once clear.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W2W) 自外檔出閘後在馬群之後切入內欄。早段走勢欠順。轉直路彎時嚴重受困。末段望空後隨即以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W) Ridden in first few early settling just over 1L off the pace in 3rd, gained 2nd 600M out 2-wide and hit the front over 200M out, hung on well under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W) 早段受催策，居前列第三位，落後領放馬稍逾一個馬位。六百米處進佔第二位，走第二疊。二百米處取得領先。在催策下保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, three wide into home straight, stayed on for pressure, couldn't quite reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。入直路時走第三疊。在催策下保持走勢，但未能真正追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly, sat midfield, held up making the Turn, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙，居中間位置。轉直路彎時受困。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W5W) Mid-field, brief effort 400m out, soon flattened out, no threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W5W) 居中間位置。四百米處一度發力，瞬即洩氣。未能威脅領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, angled out approaching 550M, 2 lengths or so back turning in, showed limited response early in straight, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。趨近五百五十米處時向外移出。入直路時落後約兩個馬位。直路早段對催策反應平平，保持穩勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Waited with towards rear, no threat to front two but stayed on to take third close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。保持走勢，接近終點時取得季軍，但未能威脅前兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W2W) Settled in front of midfield on the rail, ran on without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W2W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。保持走勢，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W2W2W) Not far off early stages gradually drifting backward to midfield over 700M out, folded up quickly after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W2W2W) 早段落後領先馬匹不遠。七百米處逐漸墮居中間位置。入直路後迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Raced close up, pushed up to challenge leader 150m out, bumped with that rival when shifting right final 100m, edged ahead near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 緊隨領先馬匹。一百五十米處受推策上前挑戰領放馬。最後一百米在向內斜跑之際與該駒互相碰撞。接近終點時取得領先，勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leader on rail, baulked for a run until the 300M after straightening, quickened to hold every chance only to be overshadowed final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬，走內欄。入直路後受困直至三百米處。加速，一度極具爭勝機會，僅於最後數步被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W) Jumped with them, raced 3 wide, 1-1/2L back, 2 wide from 700M, same margin back turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W) 與對手同步躍出，落後一個半馬位，走第三疊。自七百米處起走第二疊。入直路時落後相同距離。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Made running, responded when challenged from over 300m out, headed by winner 150m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 帶頭競跑。自三百米處起受挑戰，交出反應。一百五十米處被頭馬超越，持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W) Prominent, chased leader into home straight, soon crossed by winner 300m out, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W) 居前列，入直路時追趕領放馬。三百米處瞬即被頭馬過頭，在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W3W) Sat handy, weakened entering the Straight (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W3W) 居前列。進入直路時轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W3W3W) Caught 3 wide no cover behind midfield, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, switched for clear run top of home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。直路初轉換跑線以望空。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W4W) Began well, raced 3 wide slightly behind midfield, 3 to 4 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W4W) 出閘迅速，居中間稍後位置，走第三疊。入直路時落後三至四個馬位。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Ridden early before gradually settling in 6th within 3L of pace, swung wide for a run into straight, made moderate progress under pressure early on but unable to sustain effort inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 早段受催策，繼而逐漸居第六位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位。入直路時移出外疊取位。直路早段在催策下略為追前，但最後一百米後繼無力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, angled out rounding the home turn, ran on okay.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 居中間位置，走第二疊。轉直路彎時向外移出。走勢不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in rear of mid-field, ridden 300m out, ran on well to close on leaders late but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後位置。三百米處受催策。末段以佳勢上前追近領先馬匹，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W2W4W) Settled in mid-field, pushed along 550m out, wide into home straight, flattened out final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W2W4W) 居中間位置。五百五十米處受推策。入直路時走外疊。最後二百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (1W1W1W1W) Sat in front of midfield on the rail, held up on the Home Turn, ran on strongly to just miss 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(1W1W1W1W) 居中間之前位置，走內欄。直路彎受困。末段以勁勢上前，僅失亞席。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Soon dropped to rear of midfield on the rail mainly some 3L off the pace, shared 6th on rail rounding home bend, angled out for a run upon straightening but could only run home one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 瞬即墮居中間之後位置，大多落後領放馬約三個馬位，走內欄。轉直路彎時沿欄並居第六位。入直路時向外移出取位，但末段僅能保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Sat towards the rear on the rail, never impress.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 居後列，走內欄。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, ridden top of home straight, stayed on but unable to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路初受催策。保持走勢，但未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (1W1W1W) Slowly into stride, driven along and outpaced early stages, challenged up rail from 300m out, stayed on well to close on leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(1W1W1W) 出閘緩慢，受催策，早段未能跟上步速。自三百米處起沿欄展開挑戰，保持佳勢，追近領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W4W) Raced in rear, pushed along wide into home straight, tended to hang in throughout in home straight, stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W4W) 居後列。入直路時在推策下走外疊。直路上沿途傾向內閃。保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2WNIL) Retired from the event. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2WNIL) 被收停。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W2W) With leaders briefly before settling in midfield about 3L off the pace, gained closer on rail to 2L 4th over 600M out but crowded 400M out, unable to make any further impression under pressure after straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W2W) 早段一度與領先馬匹並跑，其後居中間位置，落後領放馬約三個馬位。六百米處沿欄追近，居第四位，落後兩個馬位。四百米處受擠迫。入直路後受催策，但未能進一步追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W) Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, commenced move 450M, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。四百五十米處開始上前。末段衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W) Began only fairly, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground throughout, showed good response in straight, hit the front 150M, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居中間位置，走內疊。沿途走內疊節省腳程。直路上對催策反應良佳。一百五十米處取得領先。末段保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, unable to obtain clear run in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上未能望空。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Taken back from gate 13, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, a bit closer on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 150M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 自第十三檔出閘後留後，居中間之後位置，走第三疊，有遮擋。直路彎略為追近。直路早段略為追前。一百五十米處未能再增速，末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W) Waited with towards rear, checked briefly when ridden early in home straight, some late gains.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W) 居後列，留力候上。直路初受催策時一度勒避。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W2W) Sat behind midfield 2 wide, one pace when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後位置，走第二疊。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W3W) Sat behind the leaders on the rail, hung out rounding the Home Turn, eased down soon after. (Racing Manners Unacceptable, must trial) (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W3W) 居領先馬匹之後，走內欄。轉直路彎時外閃，其後瞬即收慢。（走勢難以接受，必須試閘及格。）（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (4W1W1W) Average to begin, raced in 3rd, 1 to 2 lengths back, 2nd on turn, made some progress early in straight, no extra final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(4W1W1W) 出閘一般，居第三位，落後一至兩個馬位。直路彎居第二位。直路早段略為追前，最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, easy run to turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off strongly, won by 2 lengths.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎前走勢輕鬆。入直路後保持走內疊。衝刺強勁，以兩個馬位之先掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W5W) Three wide in rear, pushed along wide into home straight, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W5W) 居後列，走第三疊。入直路時受推策，走外疊。保持走勢，但未能增速以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W2W) Pressed forward to soon join the leaders, gradually shifted 2L back to 4th onto first turn, kept on well without quickening from a similar position into straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W2W) 受催策上前，瞬即追上領先馬匹。開始轉首個彎位時逐漸留後兩個馬位，居第四位。入直路時自相若位置保持佳勢，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Bumped start, raced 2 wide towards rear, similar position on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 起步時被碰撞，居後列，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路上追前甚多，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Sat behind midfield, traveled greenly, minor ground made.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 居中間之後位置。走勢稚嫩。末段略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Sat rear, held up between the 200M to 150M, minor progress made in the Straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 居後列。二百米處至一百五十米處之間受困。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W4W) Sat off midfield 3 wide, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W4W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Settled in front of midfield, held up until the 200M, closed off okay. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間之前位置。受困直至二百米處。末段衝刺尚可。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W1W1W) Sat on pace, traveled okay, responded nicely when asked.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W1W1W) 居前列。走勢不俗。對催策反應良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W1W1W) Involved in early battle for lead, chased leader until no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W1W1W) 早段爭奪領先。追趕領放馬，直至最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(-) (1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(-)(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎受推策，追趕領先馬匹。保持佳勢，但未能與頭馬抗衡。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Sat midfield 2 wide, unable to quickened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置﹐走第二疊。未能增速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled midfield, traveled okay, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置，走勢普通。保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (5W3W4W) Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, weakened early in straight when hard run took effect.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(5W3W4W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。早段耗力太多，直路初轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Wide throughout, ridden and lost ground from mid-field on bend, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 沿途走外疊。受催策，直路彎自中間位置失地。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W3W) Raced in touch with leaders, travelled smoothly into home straight, ran on well to edge ahead final 50m in tight finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹，入直路時走勢暢順。走勢良佳，最後五十米取得領先，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W) Out with rest, raced in midfield on the outside, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, closed off well to make frame without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置，走外疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。衝刺良佳，取得第四名，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Made contact with the gate on jumping, sat rear, made some ground from behind.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 躍出時觸碰閘廂，居後列。末段自後列略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 出閘一般，居中間位置，走第二疊。直路彎居相若位置。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Rail position in mid-field, switched for clear run 600m out, ridden top of home straight, no extra final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處轉換跑線以望空。直路初受催策。最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, keen middle stages, quickened early in home straight to lead 200m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。中段搶口。直路初加速，二百米處取得領先，其後保持領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W4W) Began well, raced 2 wide better than midfield, wider on turn, hard ridden from 300M, took the lead 100M, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W4W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。直路彎走較外疊。自三百米處起受力策。一百米處取得領先。保持佳勢，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) From draw 1 sat handily behind leaders, moved up to challenge for the lead early straight, led inside 200M and had every chance, caught by first two late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，跟隨領先馬匹。直路初上前爭奪領先。二百米處取得領先，一度甚具爭勝機會。末段被首兩名馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Not far off early, improved to one-out-one-back 600M out, hit the front over 250M out only to find no extra inside final 100M
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 早段落後不遠。六百米處推進至第二位，走第二疊。二百五十米處取得領先，僅於最後一百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Raced very wide with the leaders holding narrow advantage between the 800 and 600M, close-up in 2nd on rail turning into straight, unable to draw level throughout and swamped for 2nd final strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 與領先馬匹並跑，走大外疊。八百米處至六百米處之間以短距離領先。轉入直路時沿欄追近，居第二位，但一直未能追上頭馬。最後數步被超越，失去亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from gate 1, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, kept on well in straight to take a place.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上保持佳勢，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W) Went forward, emerged as leader 850M, pressed by rival middle stages, hung on to the lead until passing 200M, weakened rapidly late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W) 上前，八百五十米處取得領先。中段受對手追迫。保持領先直至跑過二百米處。末段迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Away swiftly, tracked speed one off the rail, loomed up 150m out and quickened nicely to score, despite laying in over the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘迅速，跟隨領放馬，走第二疊。一百五十米處追前。末段雖然內閃，但以佳勢加速上前，掄元。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Tracked leader, taken wider on bend, under pressure 350m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 跟隨領放馬。直路彎移出較外疊。三百五十米處受催策，最後一百米洩氣。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Shifted out and bumped exiting stalls, tracked leaders against rail, challenged up rail from 300m out, unable to quicken.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘時向外斜跑及被碰撞。跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自三百米處起沿欄展開挑戰，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Began awkwardly, momentarily racing wide without cover before ridden along to be outside the leader, battled on well but just couldn't hold off the winner over final 50m (See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘笨拙，一度走外疊，沒有遮擋。其後受催策上前，居領放馬外側。以佳勢力拼，但最後五十米未能抗衡頭馬。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Well there from a low draw, snatched up when crossed on rail 600M out, angled out from 2L 3rd 450M out for a clear run into straight but could only keep on at the one pace without quickening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 自內檔出閘，居好位。六百米處在內欄被過頭之際勒避。四百五十米處居第三位，落後兩個馬位，向外移出以於入直路時望空，但其後僅能保持同速，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) From wide draw ended up chasing leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, couldn't quicken enough on straightening, always held by leaders in the run home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 自外檔出閘後追趕領先馬匹，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時加速力不足。末段一直未能追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began well from the one draw settling just off the pace, obtained cover one back behind leader over 600M out, angled out to challenge upon straightening but faded steadily inside final 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，居領放馬稍後位置。六百米處落後領放馬一個馬位，有遮擋。入直路時向外移出以展開挑戰，但最後一百米逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Prominent from a poor draw travelling 3-wide early, shared 4th some 3L off the pace from early in back straight, fought on dourly from 2L back into home straight and only to be denied narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自第七檔出閘，早段居前列，走第三疊。自對面直路早段起並列第四位，落後領放馬約三個馬位。入直路時持續力拼，落後兩個馬位。僅以短距離之差落敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (3W3W) Moderately away, raced in midfield on outer, no cover for the majority of the race, showed limited response in straight, badly hampered by the fallers and brought down near 75M.
(Sustained a laceration to the left front fetlock and lame in left front leg.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a laceration to the left front fetlock and lame in left front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(3W3W) 出閘普通，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路上對催策反應平平。接近七十五米處時受跌倒的馬匹嚴重阻礙及跌倒。
（左前球節部位割傷及左前腿不良於行。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （左前球節部位割傷及左前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled towards rear on rail from moderate start, made gradual headway from the 600M to reach 3L 7th into straight, quickened well inside final 150M to just fail to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 起步普通，居後列，走內欄。自六百米處起逐漸上前，入直路時進佔第七位，落後三個馬位。最後一百五十米加速良佳，過終點時僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W4W) Began well from a poor draw gradually settling over 4-wide towards rear of bunched field, commenced move 650M out swinging the widest into straight, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W4W) 自外檔出閘迅速，逐漸居馬群後列，走第四疊。六百五十米處開始上前。入直路時移出最外疊。末段在催策下上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away with them, raced 3 wide better than midfield early, 2 wide from 600M, finished off strongly to score. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步出閘，早段居中間之前位置，走第三疊。自六百米處起走第二疊。衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Moderately away from gate 1, raced in midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 150M, finished off strongly, led close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘普通，居中間位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空。一百五十米處望空。末段衝刺強勁。接近終點時取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Mid-field, tight for room when challenging up rail over 200m out, clear 150m out and stayed on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間位置。二百米處在沿欄展開挑戰之際受緊迫。一百五十米處望空。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Waited with in rear, strong run from 200m out to lead close home despite edging right and making contact with runner-up near line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居後列，留力候上。自二百米處起以勁勢追前，雖然於接近終點時向內斜跑及與亞軍馬匹互相觸碰，但仍能取得領先。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Bumped start and unbalanced, inconvenienced shortly after start, raced behind midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight to take 2nd, no threat to the winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步時發生碰撞及失去平衡，其後不久受妨礙，居中間之後位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路上追前甚多，跑獲亞軍，但未能威脅頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Crowded after the start, soon moved forward and vied for the lead, couldn't go on mid-straight and weakened. (Jockey - disadvantaged when pressured in the lead.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 起步後受擠迫，瞬即上前爭奪領先。直路中段無以為繼，轉弱。（騎師表示，坐騎在領放下受追迫而不利發揮。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Pressed forward from the widest draw to share the pace racing very wide, obtained 2-wide position in front coming onto first turn 600M out, hung on under pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 自最外檔出閘後受催策上前，並排領先，走大外疊。六百米處開始轉首個彎位時取得領先，走第二疊。直路上在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, raced 3 wide towards rear, wider turning in, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居後列，走第三疊。入直路時走更外疊。直路初未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Held up last after slowly away, still in last place 400m out, eye-catching headway from rear final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;出閘緩慢後留居包尾位置。四百米處仍居包尾位置。最後二百米自後列追前甚多。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Prominent early, unable to sustain and dropped away swiftly in the final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;早段居前列。末段無以為繼，迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Badly unbalanced when bumped by rival after the start, ended up racing 3-wide towards the rear, brought widest to the straight then made limited progress to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 起步後被對手碰撞之際嚴重失去平衡，因而居後列，走第三疊。直路前移出最外疊，其後略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced wide in mid-field, travelled smoothly to 350m out, pushed along and soon unable to quicken, faded.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;居中間位置，走外疊。走勢暢順至三百五十米處。受推策，瞬即未能增速。力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (6W2W2W) Across to settle in mid-field, switched to secure clear run 200m out, never dangerous.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(6W2W2W) 切入居中間位置，二百米處轉換跑線以望空。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W2W2W) Shifted in and bumped out of stalls, got across to track leaders, followed winner through 300m out, stayed on well but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W2W2W) 出閘時向內斜跑及發生碰撞，切入內疊以跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處跟隨頭馬上前。保持佳勢，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Soon took up running obtaining rails run early in back straight, led the field until joined over 250m out, fought on well under pressure but found fast-finishing winner too strong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 瞬即帶頭。對面直路早段移入內欄。保持領先，二百五十米處被追上。在催策下以佳勢力拼，但未能抗衡衝刺凌厲的頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, ridden on bend to chase leaders, travelled smoothly for clear run top of home straight, narrow lead 150m out, no match for front two.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路彎在催策下追趕領先馬匹。走勢暢順，直路初望空。一百五十米處以短距離領先。末段不敵首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W1W1W) Began well from gate 9, sent forward to race prominently, took the lead 850M, led by 1-1/2L turning in, kept on well in straight, just able to hold off the challenger late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W1W1W) 自第九檔出閘迅速，受催策上前，居前列。八百五十米處取得領先。入直路時領先一個半馬位。直路上保持佳勢。末段力拒對手的挑戰險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W) Ridden along early to lead, travelled smoothly, kept on nicely to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W) 早段在催策下取得領先，走勢暢順。保持佳勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(+) (3W1W) Ridden along to lead on the rail, caught in the early straight, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(+)(3W1W) 在催策下取得領先，走內欄。直路早段被超越。末段保持穩勢。

formguide.comments_eng: Australian PP, a 3-year-old gelding, by Written Tycoon from Chateau Cheval, a daughter of High Chaparral. Horses by the same sire include Tomodachi Kokoroe and Sing Dragon. This fellow had four starts in Australia for one win (a 3yo maiden over 1200m). He was given four trials in Hong Kong for two placings. He made the run and finished second under pressure, beaten by 1L, over 800m on turf in Conghua on April 27. In the latest trial, he made the run and finished second under pressure, beaten by 1/2L, over 1000m on turf in Conghua on June 26. Prefer to take a watching brief to see how he shapes at his local debut.
formguide.comments_chi: 「千秋巨子」(Written Tycoon)之後，在港同父馬包括「好友心得」及「昇瀧駒」等駒，生母出自「灌木叢」(High Chaparral)。來港前於澳洲四戰得一勝，該場為1200米三歲從未勝出馬賽。抵港後四次試閘兩次上名。4月27日出試從化草地800米，早段領放，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬一個馬位。最近6月26日出試從化草地1000米，早段領放，末段力策下跑第二名，落後頭馬半個馬位。初出暫宜觀望。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced in midfield early. Made progress on centre track late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段於馬群中間競跑。末段沿跑道中央上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Jumped only fairly, ended up racing at the back of the field, failed to make any real progress final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;出閘僅屬一般，居馬群後列。最後四百米無甚進展。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Crowded at start, rail position in mid-field, driven along 600m out, unable to pick up for pressure against rail from 400m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 起步時受擠迫，居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處受催策。自四百米處起沿欄在催策下未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) From a low draw obtained a midfield position along the inside, couldn't go on passing 300M, weakened to last.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自內檔出閘，居中間位置，走內疊。跑過三百米處時無以為繼。轉弱，包尾而回。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Driven along and outpaced early stages, eased when detached 600m out, never involved.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 早段受催策，未能跟上步速。六百米處被拋離時收慢。從未參與競逐。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (4W4W) Caught racing wide no cover in midfield from draw 12, failed to run on final 400M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(4W4W) 自第十二檔出閘，居中間位置，走外疊，沒有遮擋。最後四百米未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; (1W4W) Never a danger in last few, detached from over 500M out.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;(1W4W) 居最後數位之內。從未構成威脅。自五百米處起被拋離。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced in midfield early. Kept on evenly late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段於馬群中間競跑。末段維持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Settled in worse than midfield in 8th, checked and switched for a run 300M out but did not find much until too late 100M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 居中間之後第八位。三百米處勒避，轉換跑線以望空，但空位不足直至一百米處。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Away in line, raced in midfield, was steadied 600M when crowded for room, did not run on when asked for an effort in the home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 與對手同步出閘，居中間位置。六百米處受擠迫之際收慢。直路上受催策時未能追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W2W) Sat handy, traveled smoothly, kept on under whip, closed off nicely.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W2W) 居前列位置，走勢順暢。在催策下保持走勢，末段衝刺良佳。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W3W) Tracked leading pair, effort 300m out, no extra final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W3W) 緊隨領放兩駒。三百米處受催策，最後一百五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W) Shifted in at start and made contact, raced towards rear on the outside, moved a bit closer on turn, very wide into straight, made minor progress in the run home. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W) 起步時向內斜跑，發生觸碰，居後列，走外疊。直路彎略為追近。入直路時走大外疊。末段略為追前。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to fast; Crowded start, raced at rear on the stands' rail, checked near 600M, 7 lengths back near 400M, one-paced thereafter.
(Sustained a laceration to the right front cannon.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Sustained a laceration to the right front cannon.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏快步速;起步時受擠迫，居後列，走外欄。接近六百米處時勒避。接近四百米處時落後七個馬位。其後保持同速。
（右前腿管骨部位割傷。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Led on centre track early. Weakened at 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;早段沿跑道中央領放。五十米力弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced down center of the track and stayed close to leaders throughout, failed to pick up speed form 400M, no extra mid-straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;在跑道中央競跑，沿途保持緊隨領先馬匹。自四百米處起未能加速，直路中段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Raced in touch with leaders against rail, challenged and every chance from 300m out, no extra final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;跟隨領先馬匹，走外欄。自三百米處起展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。最後五十米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Mustered no early pace, gradually improved his position further up the field at the centre part of the track middle stages, kept finding plenty to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;早段缺乏前速。中段逐漸在馬群中推進上前，在跑道中央競跑。保持勁勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Settled in front of midfield, gave ground quickly entering the Straight (Disappointing Performance, Must BT, See Incident Report).
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 居中間之前位置。入直路時迅速墮退。（表現令人失望。必須試閘及格。見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Tracked leaders, under pressure 350m out, flattened out final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領先馬匹。三百五十米處受催策。最後一百米無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Quickest away from the stalls and straight to the lead, setting fast sectionals, stuck to the task until the last 75m, passed by some strong-finishing rivals thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘最快，隨即上前，以快步速領放。持續力拼至七十五米處。其後被衝刺強勁的對手超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Prominent, took up running over 800M out setting a sound pace, held narrow lead until headed about 250M out, folded up quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居前列，八百米處帶頭，以快步速領放。以短距離領先，直至二百五十米處被超越。迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, towards the rear 6Ls back, failed to run on in the straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙及失地，居後列，落後六個馬位。直路上未能上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Soon recovered from moderate start along the rail to share early pace, crossed by race leaders and lost position 600M out, some 3L back in 4th rounding home bend, faded steadily in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步普通，瞬即恢復走勢，早段跟上步速，走內欄。六百米處被領先馬匹橫越，失位。轉直路彎時居第四位，落後約三個馬位。直路上逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Gradually taken back from a wide barrier to be last with rails run 750M out, improved steadily closer home bend reaching 5L 10th into straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，逐漸留後。七百五十米處居包尾位置，走內欄。直路彎穩步上前追近，入直路時進佔第十位，落後五個馬位。末段以佳勢上前，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W2W) Box seat, switched for clear run 400m out, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, tired closing stages and just held fourth.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W2W) 居包廂位置。四百米處轉換跑線以望空。直路早段加速，二百五十米處取得領先。末段呈現疲態，僅能保住第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 5 lengths back turning in, made no progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後五個馬位。直路上毫無進展。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (5W3W3W) Sat behind midfield 3 wide, raced wide and without cover in the early stages, raced keenly near 800M, finished off strongly to take 2nd, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(5W3W3W) 居中間之後位置，走第三疊。早段走外疊，沒有遮擋。接近八百米處時搶口。衝刺強勁，跑獲第二名。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow(-) (2W3W4W) Made contact shortly after start, positioned 2 wide, 4 lengths back in the early stages, 3 wide after passing 700M, slightly improved on turn, very wide into straight, finished off well to take 2nd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速(-)(2W3W4W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，走第二疊。早段落後四個馬位。跑過七百米處後走第三疊。直路彎略為追前。入直路時走大外疊。衝刺良佳，跑獲亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; Tracked leaders, pressed on 300m out, soon on top and won comfortably.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處受催策，瞬即取得領先，輕鬆勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; Chased leader, unable to close gap to that rival under pressure from 300m out, no extra closing stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;追趕領放馬。自三百米處起受催策，但未能收窄與領放馬的距離。末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Broke well from a wide barrier before gradually taken back to race in last few, fought on steadily from a similar position into straight but never threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 自外檔出閘迅速，其後逐漸留居最後數位之內。入直路時居相若位置，持續力拼，但從未構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W3W) Chased leading group in the 6th spot, couldn't keep up after straightening, tired final 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W3W) 追趕領先馬匹，居第六位。入直路後未能跟上。最後二百米呈現疲態。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Broke well settling within 3L of the pace in 7th, tightened just inside the 600M and baulked briefly upon straightening, ran on steadily under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第七位，落後領放馬不逾三個馬位。跑過六百米處後受緊迫。入直路時一度受困。在催策下穩步上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Sat near midfield 2 off the outside rail, weakened final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;居接近中間位置，走外欄第三疊。最後三百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; Jumped awkwardly, sat worse than midfield on the stands rail, made no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;出閘笨拙，居中間之後位置，走外欄。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Niggled along behind midfield, in similar position into straight, kept on at the same pace without quickening under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 受催策上前，居中間之後位置。入直路時居相若位置。末段在催策下保持同速，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W3W) Became badly unbalanced when bumped after the start, raced in mid-division, failed to respond on straightening, soon beaten and eased. (Jockey - concern with the horse's action in the Home Straight.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W3W) 起步後發生碰撞，因而嚴重失去平衡，居中間位置。入直路時對催策毫無反應。瞬即洩氣及收慢。（騎師表示，他對坐騎在直路上的動作有疑慮。）

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W2W3W) Caught wide early stages, retrained to a rear spot settled further back than intended, had some work to do 400M but made only limited progress to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W2W3W) 早段走外疊，其後受約束以居較賽前部署為後的後列位置。四百米處落後頗遠，但末段僅能略為上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, ridden along final bend, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎受催策。未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W4W) Settled in mid-field, commenced move out wide 800m out, sustained headway to join leader 200m out, stuck to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W4W) 居中間位置。八百米處開始上前，走外疊。持續追前，二百米處追上領放馬。末段持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Tracked pace, trapped behind horses for much of home straight, clear over 100m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領放馬。直路上大部分途程在馬群之後受困。一百米處望空，但未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W2W2W) Sat midfield early, raced wide in the early stages and went forward to chase the leader, weakened from 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W2W2W) 早段居中間位置，走外疊，其後上前追趕領放馬。自二百米處起轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W2W2W) Chased the leader, traveled strongly, switched out rounding the Turn, closed off strongly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W2W2W) 追趕領放馬。走勢強勁。轉直路彎時向外移出，以勁勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W2W) Travelled keenly in 2nd 2-wide alongside leader, drew level 700M out but given reminders to hold place at the 400M, dropped away quickly inside final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側第二位，走第二疊，搶口。七百米處追上領放馬，但四百米處受鞭策以保持位置。最後一百五十米迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Chased leader, challenged strongly final 250M but winner found the necessary to hold on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 追趕領放馬。最後二百五十米以勁勢展開挑戰，但頭馬猶有餘力保住勝果。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Had a ground saving trip from draw 2 and stayed close enough behind leaders throughout, kept on steadily when placed under pressure in the straight. Held by leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自第二檔出閘，走內疊節省腳程，沿途保持緊隨領先馬匹。直路上在催策下保持穩勢，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W2W2W) Ridden along from stalls to get across, chased leader, driven along 500m out, sticking to task.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W2W2W) 出閘後受催策以切入內疊，追趕領放馬。五百米處受催策。持續力拼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W2W) Jumped with them, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, finished off strongly to score by a neck.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。衝刺強勁，以一馬頸位之先勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Stayed close to leaders throughout, pace very slow in early stages, worked into the race well, tried hard to reel in first two final 300M but was always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 沿途緊隨領先馬匹，早段步速非常緩慢。走勢良佳。最後三百米力拼以追及頭兩名馬匹，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W) Always prominent, hit the front briefly 300M out only to be caught at about the 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W) 一直居前列。三百米處一度取得領先，僅於約一百米處被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, there to turn, showed limited response early in straight, weakened gradually final 150M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路早段對催策反應平平。最後一百五十米逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W1W1W1W) Led steadily first half of the race, quickened up pace from 800M, kept going well in the straight and was only caught by winner late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W1W1W1W) 前半段以平穩步速領放。自八百米處起加速。直路上保持佳勢，僅於末段被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Clean jump, took the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kicked clear early in straight, kept on well to the line and scored.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘俐落，取得領先。直路彎前走勢暢順。直路初加速帶離對手。保持佳勢至終點，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Driven to the lead as expected, travelled well enough during the race, was nicely clear mid-straight only to be caught by first two close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 一如預期受催策以取得領先。陣上走勢良佳。直路中段以佳勢帶離對手，僅於接近終點時被頭兩名馬匹超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Pressed leader, challenged winner top of home straight, joined winner 200m out, weakened final 50m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 追迫領放馬。直路初挑戰頭馬。二百米處追上頭馬。最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(+) (1W1W) From wide draw went forward and crossed to the lead 1400M, fought hard to stay in contention on straightening, headed nearing 100M and faded to 4th late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(+)(1W1W) 自大外檔出閘後上前，千四米處切入領放。入直路時力拼以保持爭逐機會。接近一百米處時被超越。末段力弱，跑獲第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W1W1W1W) Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, shared lead turning in, peaked and headed 300M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘迅速，在催策下上前領放。入直路時並排領先。三百米處未能再增速，被超越。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked 400m out, stayed on well, pressed by winner to line and just failed.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。四百米處加速。保持佳勢。被頭馬追迫至終點，僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Broke well from a wide barrier to join the leaders 3-wide, taken one back for cover 1400M out, remained wide on home bend and into straight, folded up quickly upon straightening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 自外檔出閘迅速，追上領先馬匹，走第三疊。千四米處留後一個馬位以取得遮擋。直路彎及入直路時保持走外疊，入直路後迅速力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W2W) Showed good speed to lead, headed 1100m out, remained prominent, quickened early in home straight to lead 250m out, headed on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。千一米處被超越。保持居前列。直路早段加速，二百五十米處取得領先。過終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W1W1W) Across from wide draw to lead, kicked top of home straight, joined by runner-up 200m out, ran on well final 200m to go away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自大外檔出閘，切入領放。直路初加速。二百米處被亞軍馬匹追上。最後二百米以佳勢上前，帶離勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W3W) Jumped awkwardly and lost ground, ended up near last 10Ls off leader middle stages, worked home fairly in the straight and was never dangerous. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W3W) 出閘笨拙及失地。中段居接近包尾位置，落後領放馬十個馬位。直路上衝刺一般，從未能構成威脅。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Began smartly, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, made some progress early in straight, peaked 100M, kept on same pace to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路早段略為追前。一百米處未能再增速。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, not best of runs 400m out to 200m out, checked twice when short of room from 200m out to 100m out, unable to be ridden out to finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。四百米處至二百米處之間取位不太暢順。自二百米處起至一百米處在空位不足時兩度勒避。未能被力策至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W4W) Raced in touch with leaders, moved smoothly into contention 300m out, ran on well and beaten only narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。三百米處順勢上前爭勝。走勢良佳，僅以短距離見負。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W3W3W4W) Settled down in second half of the field with the middle stages being run outside of standard time, 3Ls behind leader 400M, closed off steadily to claim 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W3W3W4W) 居後半馬群中。賽事中段的步速較標準時間為慢。四百米處落後領放馬三個馬位。末段以穩勢衝刺，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W1W1W) Soon taken across to the fence and obtained a position behind midfield, 4-5Ls to make up 400M, ran home one paced and was never a serious threat to leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W1W1W) 瞬即切入內欄，居中間之後位置。四百米處落後四至五個馬位。末段保持同速，從未對領先馬匹構成真正威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W) Close up, taken one back 3-wide after the first 300M shifting further back near midfield and lost cover 1200M out, faded steadily under pressure in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W) 緊隨領先馬匹，過了首三百米後留後一個馬位，走第三疊。其後進一步墮後，千二米處居接近中間位置，失去遮擋。直路上在催策下逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W2W2W) Raced outside the lead, weakened in the Straight. (See Incident Report)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居領放馬外側。直路上轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W2W) Slowly away, rail position in mid-field, switched 600m out, challenged and every chance from 300m out, just held third.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W2W) 出閘緩慢，居中間位置，走內欄。六百米處轉換跑線。自三百米處起展開挑戰，已獲機會盡展所長。僅保住季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Slowly into stride, raced towards rear, tight for room briefly against rail when trying to improve 300m out, went second 100m out, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘緩慢，居後列。三百米處嘗試沿欄推進時一度空位不足。一百米處進佔第二位，保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W2W) Tracked leaders against rail, switched for clear run 350m out, unable to pick up for pressure and dropped away quickly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。三百五十米處轉換跑線以望空。在催策下未能加速，迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W2W) Bumped and lost balance 1500m out, dropped out from wide draw and quickly improved to rail position in mid-field, angled off rail 450m out, ran on well to get up on line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W2W) 自外檔出閘後墮後，迅速上前進佔中間位置，走內欄。千五米處與對手互相碰撞，失去平衡。四百五十米處移離內欄。末段以佳勢上前，終點線上僅勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W2W) Rail position in mid-field, followed winner through 300m out, stayed on well but no match for winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W2W) 居中間位置，走內欄。三百米處跟隨頭馬上前。保持佳勢，但未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Very slow; (2W3W1W1W) Settled in second half of the field early stages, raced keenly and made rapid forward move from 900M to take lead, held on gamely when challenged by rivals on both sides in the straight. Gutsy win.
(Jockey dropped whip near 150M.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
極慢步速;(2W3W1W1W) 早段居後半馬群中，搶口。自九百米處起迅速上前，取得領先。直路上受兩側對手挑戰，以勁勢力拒來犯，憑鬥志勝出。
（於接近一百五十米處時騎師跌掉馬鞭。）
runnerrecords.incident_chi: （於接近一百五十米處時騎師跌掉馬鞭。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(+) (1W1W) Bumped on jumping, took the lead, led by 1/2L turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked and headed 150M, weakened final 50M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(+)(1W1W) 躍出時發生碰撞，取得領先。入直路時領先半個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。最後五十米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, led by 2 lengths turning in, kicked clear early in straight, kept on well but unable to hold off the winner close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前領放。入直路時領先兩個馬位。直路早段帶離餘駒，保持佳勢，但接近終點時未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Raced in touch with leaders, chased along on bend, stayed on for pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 緊隨領先馬匹。直路彎追趕對手。在催策下保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(-) (2W4W) Dropped out from widest draw, still in last place and pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well final 200m to move into third 50m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(-)(2W4W) 自最外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時仍居包尾位置，走最外疊，受推策。最後二百米以佳勢追前。五十米處進佔第三位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) From wide draw given a conservative ride at the rear, had plenty to make up 400M but failed to pick up pace.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列。四百米處落後甚遠，但未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W3W3W) Restrained to race in second half of the field, travelled keenly, lost cover from 900M strode forward to chase leaders, run ended mid-straight and had no extra late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W3W3W) 受約束，居後半馬群中，跑來搶口。自九百米處起展步上前追趕領先馬匹，失去遮擋。直路中段無以為繼，末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W) Made some use take up a position outside the lead, failed to respond to riding in the home straight, weakened badly to finish tailed out. (Unacceptable Performance / No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W) 略受催策上前，佔取領放馬外側位置。直路上對催策毫無反應。末段嚴重轉弱，大敗而回。（表現難以接受。）（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Raced keenly behind leaders, forward move to challenge 300m out, every chance, faded final 150m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居領先馬匹之後，搶口。三百米處上前展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。最後一百五十米力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Bumped shortly after start, rail position in mid-field, had to wait for run turning into home straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 起步後不久發生碰撞，居中間位置，走內欄。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。末段未能增速以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Took up running narrowly shortly after start, kicked some 2L clear 1100M out, had no more to give when headed 300M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 起步後不久以短距離領先。千一米處加速帶離約兩個馬位。三百米處被超越，再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W2W4W5W) Settled in midfield, moved to a 3-wide spot without cover entering home turn, kept on same pace before weakening 200M. (Jockey: no explanation for the disappointing performance / No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W2W4W5W) 居中間位置。轉入直路彎時移至第三疊，沒有遮擋。其後保持同速，二百米處轉弱。（騎師未能就坐騎令人失望的表現提供任何解釋。賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Mid division, ridden 1400m out to chase leader out wide without cover, good headway on bend to lead 500m out, not beaten far.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。千四米處受催策，追趕領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路彎以佳勢上前，五百米處取得領先。所負不遠。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W) Wide throughout, forward move to race outside of leading pair from halfway, weakened quickly 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W) 沿途走外疊。自半程起上前，居領先兩駒外側。三百米處迅速轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (3W3W) Prominent out wide from a poor draw, remained 3-wide without cover in 3rd home bend and wider into straight, held every chance until faded under pressure out of contention inside final 300M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(3W3W) 自第七檔出閘，居前列，走外疊。直路彎居第三位，仍走第三疊，沒有遮擋。入直路時走更外疊。一度極具爭勝機會，直至最後三百米受催策，但力竭，再無爭勝機會。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W2W) Settled midfield, traveled fairly, finished last, not much impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W2W) 居中間位置，走勢一般。包尾過終點，無甚表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (2W2W2W2W) Tightened at start settling in rear on rail and waited with, obtained a clear run near the centre of the track over 150M out, quickened well to snatch victory close to home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(2W2W2W2W) 起步時受緊迫，居後列，走內欄，留力候上。一百五十米處在靠近跑道中央位置望空。末段加速良佳，接近終點時取得勝利。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W3W3W3W) Moderately away, raced 3 wide better than midfield, no cover throughout, a bit closer turning in, peaked on run 200M, weakened thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W3W3W3W) 出閘普通，居中間之前位置，走第三疊。沿途沒有遮擋。入直路時略為追近。二百米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W1W1W1W) Held up last, briefly hampered against rail 1400m out, some headway middle stages, stayed on but lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W1W1W1W) 留居包尾位置。千四米處沿欄競跑時一度受阻礙。中段略為追前。保持走勢，但速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W3W3W) Crowded shortly after start, raced towards rear on the outside, 4 lengths or so back turning in, made some progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W3W3W) 起步後不久受擠迫，居後列，走外疊。入直路時落後約四個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W1W) Waited with towards rear, challenged up rail from 200m out, ran on well to make up several places.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W1W) 居後列，留力候上。自二百米處起沿欄展開挑戰。末段走勢良佳，追前數位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (5W4W3W4W) Mid division, improved to track pace out wide without cover 1300m out, dropped away quickly in home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(5W4W3W4W) 中間位置。推進上前，千三米處跟隨領放馬，走外疊，沒有遮擋。直路上迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W1W1W1W) Sat rear, improved passing 600M, stayed on fairly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W1W1W1W) 居後列。跑過六百米處時上前。末段保持一般走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W2W3W) Three wide in mid-field without cover early stages, settled with cover middle stages, forced to steady 450m out, unable to recover.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W2W3W) 早段居中間位置，走第三疊，沒有遮擋。中段取得遮擋。四百五十米處被迫收慢，未能恢復走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W2W) Settled just over 3L back in 5th on rail, obtained a clear run 200M out, ran on under pressure without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W2W) 居第五位，落後稍逾三個馬位，走內欄。二百米處望空。在催策下上前，未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W1W) Taken back to race at rear on the inside, still 8 lengths back turning in, finished off evenly. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W1W) 留居後列，走內疊。入直路時仍落後八個馬位。末段以穩勢衝刺。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W2W1W2W) Tracked leader along the inside, responded well to be challenging for the lead from 300M, kept battling to the line final stages but was always held by winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W2W1W2W) 跟隨領放馬，走內疊。自三百米處起對催策反應良佳，爭奪領先。末段持續力拼至終點，但一直未能抗衡頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (1W1W) Crowded and bumped leaving stalls, ridden along from stalls to lead, kicked 550m out, gave ground final 300m, forced to steady 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(1W1W) 出閘時受擠迫，發生碰撞，其後受催策，領放。五百五十米處加速。最後三百米墮退。二百米處被迫收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, challenged up rail from top of home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。自直路初起沿欄展開挑戰。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W6W) Began well, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 3 wide on turn, 4 to 5 lengths back turning in, made no impression in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W6W) 出閘迅速，居中間之後位置，走第二疊。直路彎走第三疊。入直路時落後四至五個馬位。直路上毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (2W2W) Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, 3 lengths back, same position on turn, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(2W2W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，落後三個馬位，走第二疊。直路彎居相同位置。末段以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Began fairly gradually settling in 4th mainly about 3L off the pace, came to challenge inside the 350M reaching 2L 2nd briefly inside the 200M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘一般，逐漸居第四位，大多落後領放馬約三個馬位。三百五十米處上前展開挑戰。二百米處一度進佔第二位，落後兩個馬位。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (4W3W2W3W) Dropped out from widest draw, briefly hampered 1600m out, shuffled back mid-race, wide into home straight, no impression.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(4W3W2W3W) 自大外檔出閘後墮後。千六米處一度受阻礙。中段墮後。入直路時走外疊。毫無表現。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W3W5W) Settled well behind and waited with, commenced move approaching final turn to be one of the widest into home straight, made significant progress to be nearest at finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W3W5W) 遙居於後，留力候上。趨近直路彎時開始上前。入直路時為走最外疊的馬匹之一。追前甚多。過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W3W) Raced in rear of mid-field, not best of runs 400m out to 100m out, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W3W) 居中間之後位置。四百米處至一百米處之間取位不太暢順。其後保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (3W4W) Dropped out from wide draw, pushed along widest into home straight, ran on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(3W4W) 自外檔出閘後墮後。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。末段以佳勢上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W5W) Settled in rear of mid-field, pushed along wide into home straight, followed winner through 400m out, stayed on but no further impression on front two late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W5W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時受推策，走外疊。四百米處跟隨頭馬上前。保持走勢，但末段未能進一步威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W2W2W3W) Jumped awkward but soon in first few settling over 2L back in 4th 2-wide, came under pressure from 500M out swinging wide into straight, ran on steadily under pressure to hold every only to be outsprinted late.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W2W2W3W) 出閘笨拙，但瞬即進佔前列第四位，落後逾兩個馬位，走第二疊。自五百米處起受催策，入直路時移出外疊。在催策下保持穩勢，已獲機會盡展所長，末段僅被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (1W1W1W1W) Jumped only fairly, sat towards rear, held up making the Home Turn, ran on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 出閘僅屬一般，居後列。轉直路彎時受困。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W4W3W3W) Made contact shortly after start, raced in midfield on the outside, no cover for the majority of the race, made some progress in straight to make frame, no threat to the first few.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W4W3W3W) 起步後不久發生觸碰，居中間位置，走外疊。大部分途程沒有遮擋。直路上略為追前，取得第四名，但未能對前列馬匹構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very fast; (2W2W2W4W) Shifted out and bumped leaving stalls, raced in rear, pushed along widest into home straight, never a threat.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極快步速;(2W2W2W4W) 出閘時向外斜跑及被碰撞，居後列。入直路時受推策，走最外疊。從未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W2W3W5W) Waited with towards rear, commenced move out wide 700m out, struggling.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W2W3W5W) 居後列，留力候上。七百米處開始上前，走外疊。掙扎上前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W1W) Rail position in mid-field, challenged and every chance early in home straight, one paced and unable to get on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 居中間位置，走內欄。直路初展開挑戰，一度甚具爭勝機會。其後保持同速，未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (2W2W2W4W) Raced in mid-division, commenced move out wide 500m out, bumped 350m out, strong run to lead 150m out, on top from there.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(2W2W2W4W) 居中間位置。五百米處開始上前，走外疊。三百五十米處被碰撞。走勢強勁，一百五十米處帶頭，其後保持領先。

raceinfo_chi.Course: B 賽道 - 向後移欄

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (5W2W1W) From wide draw taken back to last and was given a waiting ride, 8Ls behind leader 400M, closed off fastest under top weight but couldn't be ridden out final 50M when held up between rivals.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(5W2W1W) 自大外檔出閘後留居包尾位置，早段未受催策。四百米處落後領放馬八個馬位。在負頂磅下末段衝刺最快，但最後五十米在對手之間受困時未能被力策。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Restrained to race towards the rear, 4-5Ls off leader 400M, closed off fastest to claim 3rd.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 受約束，居後列。四百米處落後領放馬四至五個馬位。末段衝刺最快，跑獲季軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Settled in mid-field, commenced move out wide 400m out, ran on well to close on leader but always held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 居中間位置。四百米處開始發力，走外疊。以佳勢追近領放馬，但一直落後。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W2W) Obtained a midfield spot along the inside, held up 300M-200M before quickening up strongly to win by dominant margin.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W2W) 居中間位置，走內疊。三百米處至二百米處之間受困，其後加速強勁，帶離對手勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W4W) Bumped on jumping, obtained a 2-wide position midfield, had every chance turning home but couldn't quicken enough final 200M to challenge for a top three finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W4W) 躍出時發生碰撞，居中間位置，走第二疊。轉直路彎時一度甚具爭勝機會，但最後二百米加速不足，未能挑戰三甲馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (2W3W) Settled in mid-field, switched 600m out, effort 500m out, stayed on but no further impression on front three late on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(2W3W) 居中間位置。六百米處轉換跑線。五百米處受催策。保持走勢，但末段未能進一步威脅頭三名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W5W) From wide draw taken back towards the rear, unable to slot in raced wide without cover, 6Ls to make up 400M, ran on powerfully final 250M to claim 2nd, nearest finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W5W) 自外檔出閘，留居後列，未能切入內疊，走外疊，沒有遮擋。四百米處落後六個馬位。最後二百五十米以勁勢追前，跑獲亞軍，過終點時最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Broke well, gradually settling just over 2L back in 4th on rail, saved ground turning in for home, one-paced without quickening under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，逐漸居第四位，落後稍逾兩個馬位，走內欄。轉入直路時走內欄節省腳程。在催策下保持同速，未能加速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Driven along after the start but failed to show sufficient pace going forward, ended up racing behind mid-division, couldn't make up ground in the straight. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 起步後受催策，但未能展現足夠前速上前，居中間之後位置。直路上未能追前。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead, kicked top of home straight, stayed on strongly, in control final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先。直路初加速。保持勁勢，最後一百米控制大局。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W3W) Average to begin, raced 2 wide better than midfield, 3 lengths back turning in, made minor progress in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W3W) 出閘一般，居中間之前位置，走第二疊。入直路時落後三個馬位。直路上略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W) From draw 1 moved up to chase leaders, steadied 350M then closed off nicely to hit lead inside 100M, ran away late to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W) 自第一檔出閘，上前追趕領先馬匹。三百五十米處收慢，其後衝刺良佳，一百米處取得領先。末段帶離對手，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Away well, raced in 2nd, 2 wide, shared lead from 650M, hard ridden approaching 250M, finished off evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 出閘迅速，居第二位，走第二疊。自六百五十米處起並排領先。趨近二百五十米處時受力策。以穩勢衝刺。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (3W2W) Tracked pace, pushed along 400m out, soon weakened.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(3W2W) 跟隨領先馬匹。四百米處受推策，瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (4W2W3W) Pressed along to be chasing leaders, couldn't quicken with rivals passing 300M, no extra late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(4W2W3W) 受催策以追趕領先馬匹。跑過三百米處時未能與對手一起加速，末段再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) Settled in mid-field, switched wide 550m out, bumped 350m out, never on terms with leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 居中間位置。五百五十米處移出外疊。三百五十米處發生碰撞。從未能追上領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, pressed leader, ridden 250m out, strong run to lead final 50m, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，追迫領放馬。二百五十米處受催策。衝刺強勁，最後五十米取得領先。從容取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W2W) Shared lead early stages before settling down in 3rd, couldn't find extra gear to challenge leaders and was comfortably held.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W2W) 早段並排領先，其後居第三位。未能加速以挑戰領先馬匹，始終未能追近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, challenged leaders early in home straight, no extra final 200m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路初挑戰領先馬匹。最後二百米再無餘力。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Well there from a middle draw before taken one back 2-wide, held up in 3rd just off the pace before drifting further away from pace 500M out, gradually faded in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 自中檔出閘，居好位，其後留後一個馬位，走第二疊。留居領放馬稍後的第三位。五百米處落後領放馬更遠。直路上逐漸力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W) Made running, headed 1200m out, remained prominent, struggled to hold position top of home straight, dropped away quickly 300m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W) 領放。千二米處被超越，仍居前列。直路初難以保持位置。三百米處迅速墮退。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast(+) (1W1W1W) Bumped out of stalls, raced in touch with leaders, had to wait for run turning into home straight, strong run to lead 150m out, won cosily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速(+)(1W1W1W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。轉入直路時須等待空位出現。走勢強勁，一百五十米處取得領先。從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Away well, raced better than midfield on the inside, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, cleared 300M, kept on well until approaching 50M, weakened gradually close home.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 出閘迅速，居中間之前位置，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初未能望空，三百米處望空。保持佳勢直至趨近五十米處，接近終點時逐漸轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, tended to hang right in home straight, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 跟隨領先馬匹，走內欄。直路上傾向內閃。在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W1W) Soon took up running holding narrow advantage, went some 1L clear upon straightening and hung on to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W1W) 瞬即領放，以短距離領先。入直路時帶離約一個馬位，保持走勢至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (2W3W) Tracked leaders, hung right under pressure home straight, no extra final 150m.
(Blood at both nostrils but no blood in trachea so was deemed not to have bled.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Blood at both nostrils but no blood in trachea so was deemed not to have bled.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路上在催策下內閃。最後一百五十米再無餘力。
（兩邊鼻孔有血，但氣管沒有血，故不被視為流鼻血。）
runnerrecords.healthissue_chi: （兩邊鼻孔有血，但氣管沒有血，故不被視為流鼻血。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W3W) In touch with leaders, good headway on bend into share of lead, weakened 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W3W) 緊隨領先馬匹。直路彎追前甚多，並排領先。二百米處轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Began awkwardly, made contact with the right side of its barrier and lost ground, raced towards rear on the inside, saved ground on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked 100M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 出閘笨拙，觸碰閘廂右側及失地，居後列，走內疊。直路彎走內疊節省腳程。直路初追前頗多。一百米處未能再增速。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (2W1W1W) Showed speed to get across, two lengths clear 600m out, three lengths clear into home straight, weakened quickly and headed by winner 150m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(2W1W1W) 展現前速，切入內疊。六百米處帶離兩個馬位。入直路時帶離三個馬位。迅速轉弱。一百五十米處被頭馬超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W) Made all, kicked two lengths clear 200m out, in control final 100m, won readily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W) 領放。二百米處加速帶離對手兩個馬位。最後一百米控制大局。從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; Jumped well, raced prominently on the middle track, peaked on run approaching 350M, weakened gradually thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;出閘迅速，居前列，在跑道中央競跑。趨近三百五十米處時未能再增速，其後逐漸轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Soon took up running on the rail setting a sound pace, angled out on straightening and hung on well under pressure in front until swamped final few strides.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 瞬即取得領先，以快步速領放，走內欄。入直路時向外移出。在領放下受催策時保持佳勢，直至最後數步被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W1W1W) Made all, showed good speed to get across, kicked 300m out, in control final 100m, won readily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W1W1W) 領放，展現甚快前速以切入。三百米處加速。最後一百米控制大局，從容勝出。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Jumped with them, sent forward to have uncontested lead, still led by 1-1/2 L rounding the home turn, boxed on well to make top four.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 與對手同步躍出，受催策上前，單騎領放。轉直路彎時仍領先一個半馬位。以佳勢力拼，取得第四名。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W1W) Made running, joined from 200m out, weakened final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W1W) 帶頭競跑。自二百米處起被追上。最後一百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (4W1W1W) Ridden to take up running 950M out and rails run 800M out, kicked some 2L clear in front rounding home bend, just held off strong challenges in straight to prevail narrowly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(4W1W1W) 受催策，九百五十米處取得領先，八百米處移入內欄。轉直路彎時加速帶離約兩個馬位。直路上力拒對手的強勁挑戰，險勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W5W) Caught racing wide in midfield, hung in throughout and responded only fairly in the straight. (Jockey fined for failing to ride out to the end of the race to the satisfaction of the Stewards.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W5W) 居中間位置，走外疊。沿途內閃，直路上對催策反應僅屬一般。（騎師因未有力策坐騎至終點，表現未能令小組滿意而被罰款。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W3W) Held a position behind midfield, swung wide into straight for his challenge but made limited progress only.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間之後位置。入直路時移出外疊以展開挑戰，但僅能略為追前。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W2W3W) Settled in mid-division, had difficulty obtaining clear running 300M-100M, kept on without threat to first two late stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W2W3W) 居中間位置。三百米處至一百米處之間難以望空。末段保持走勢，但未能威脅首兩名馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow(-) (4W2W3W) Sat at the rear, stayed on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速(-)(4W2W3W) 居後列。末段保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W3W) Jumped on terms, settled down 3-wide in midfield 3Ls back, failed to run on in the home straight. (Jockey could offer no explanation for the disappointing performance.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W3W) 與對手同步躍出，居中間位置，落後三個馬位，走第三疊。直路上未能追前。（騎師未能就坐騎令人失望的表現提供任何解釋。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W2W) Pressed forward from a poor draw settling some 1L back in 2nd in back straight, came to challenge approaching home turn and soon drew level after straightening, unable to sustain effort final stages.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W2W) 自外檔出閘，受催策上前。對面直路上居第二位，落後約一個馬位。趨近直路彎時展開挑戰。入直路後瞬即追上領放馬，但末段無以為繼。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Broke well to lead on rail, soon headed by eventual winner over 900M out, trailed over 2L back when tempo increased over 600M out, switched out to challenge into straight and only to be denied by the narrowest of margins.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，取得領先，走內欄。九百米處瞬即被頭馬超越。六百米處在步速加快時落後逾兩個馬位。入直路時向外移出以展開挑戰。以些微之差僅敗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Ridden forward early, sat outside the lead, kept on strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 早段受催策上前，居領放馬外側。保持勁勢，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Showed good speed to lead on the rail, kept on well but caught on the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 展現甚快前速，取得領先，走內欄。末段保持佳勢，但終點線上被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow(+) (1W1W) Bumped start, took the lead, led by a length, travelled well to turn, peaked and headed 250M, ran on evenly to the line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速(+)(1W1W) 起步時被碰撞，帶頭，領先一個馬位。直路彎前走勢良佳。二百五十米處未能再增速，被超越。末段走勢平穩。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W) Ridden along to lead, slightly weakened entering the Straight, lacked pace to challenge.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W) 受催策，取得領先。入直路時略為轉弱。速度不足以展開挑戰。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) Bumped start, raced prominently on the outside, there to turn, kept on evenly in straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 起步時發生碰撞，居前列，走外疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (4W2W2W) Moderately away, raced 2 wide slightly behind midfield, there to turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
(Lame in right front leg.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(4W2W2W) 出閘普通，居中間稍後位置，走第二疊。直路彎前居相同位置。直路上追前頗多，但未能構成威脅。
（右前腿不良於行。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (1W1W1W) Soon led, pressed by rival in middle stages, quickened to a clear lead early straight, kept on well just only to be caught near line.
