runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(1W1W1W) 瞬即取得領先，中段受一駒追迫。直路早段加速帶離對手，保持佳勢，僅於接近終點時被超越。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W2W3W) Tracked leaders, keen middle stages, unable to hold position final bend, eased when detached 200m out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W2W3W) 跟隨領先馬匹，中段搶口。直路彎未能保持位置。二百米處被拋離，收慢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (1W1W1W) Fast break, made all, kicked three lengths clear 200m out, won unchallenged and going away.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(1W1W1W) 出閘迅速，一直領放。二百米處加速帶離三個馬位。在未受挑戰下拋離對手取勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; (2W1W1W) Ridden along to lead, traveled nicely, kept on well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;(2W1W1W) 在催策下領放，走勢良佳。末段保持佳勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat on pace, lay in in the Straight and difficult to ride out (See Incident Report).
(Lost right front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等步速;(1W1W) 居前列。直路上內閃，難以被力策。（見競賽事件報告。）
（失去右前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; Jumped with them, raced better than midfield on the stands' side, peaked on run 350M, weakened final furlong. (See Racing Incidents.)
(Made a respiratory noise during the running of the event.)
runnerrecords.healthissue_eng: (Made a respiratory noise during the running of the event.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;與對手同步躍出，居中間之前位置，靠近外欄競跑。三百五十米處未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。（見競賽事件報告。）
（於陣上發出呼吸聲。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (3W2W2W) Surging forward and shared the lead, given every chance, hung in at the straight and stuck on evenly.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(3W2W2W) 加速上前，並排領先。一度極具爭勝機會。直路上內閃，保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W) Maintained a position in midfield, came under pressure home turn and dropped away on straightening. (No Vet findings.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W) 居中間位置。直路彎受催策。入直路時墮退。（賽後接受獸醫檢查，並無發現任何明顯異常之處。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Sat behind the leaders on the rail, kept on.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居領先馬匹之後，走內欄。保持走勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Very slow; (6W3W3W) Began well from gate 10, trapped very wide in midfield early, moved a bit closer after passing 850M, no cover throughout, peaked early in straight, weakened final furlong.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 極慢步速;(6W3W3W) 自第十檔出閘迅速。早段居中間位置，走大外疊。跑過八百五十米處後略為追近。沿途沒有遮擋。直路初未能再增速。最後二百米轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W2W2W) Sent forward to be racing outside the lead, struggled to keep up 350M, gave ground rapidly mid-straight. (Jockey - racing wide without cover the principal reason for its disappointing run.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W2W2W) 受催策上前，居領放馬外側。三百五十米處難以跟上對手。直路中段迅速墮退。（騎師表示，坐騎在沒有遮擋下走外疊是表現令人失望的主因。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) Began well from gate 1, positioned 1-1/2L behind the leader on rail, crowded near 550M, saved ground on turn, finished off strongly to score.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自第一檔出閘迅速，落後領放馬一個半馬位，走內欄。接近五百五十米處時受擠迫，直路彎走內疊節省腳程。末段衝刺強勁，勝出賽事。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (1W1W) Sat on pace, traveled nicely, raced in restricted room over the concluding stages, closed off reasonably well.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(1W1W) 跟前競跑，走勢良佳。末段在窄位競跑。衝刺不俗。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Fast; (3W4W) In touch with leaders, wide on bend, soon weakened home straight.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 快步速;(3W4W) 跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎走外疊。直路上瞬即轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast(+) (3W2W4W) Away well enough, restrained to race in midfield, had 5Ls to make up on leader 400M, ran on steadily to the line for 4th without troubling the easy winner.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速(+)(3W2W4W) 出閘迅速，受約束，居中間位置。四百米處落後領放馬五個馬位。末段穩步上前，取得第四名，未能威脅輕鬆勝出的頭馬。

runnerrecords.comments_eng:
Pace Good to slow; (1W1W1W) Tracked leaders against rail, unable to secure clear run until final 100m, lacked pace to challenge.
(Lost left front plate.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi:
中等偏慢步速;(1W1W1W) 沿欄跟隨領先馬匹。未能望空直至一百米處。速度不足以展開挑戰。
（失去左前蹄的蹄鐵。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W1W) Broke well settling just over 1L off the pace in 3rd on rail, gained closer on the inside turning in for home, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W1W) 出閘迅速，居第三位，落後領放馬稍逾一個馬位，走內欄。轉入直路時追近，走內疊。持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W3W) Shifted out and bumped shortly after start, raced in touch with leaders, under pressure to hold position on bend, one paced under pressure.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W3W) 起步後不久向外斜跑，發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎在催策下保持位置。末段在催策下保持同速。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (5W3W3W) Caught racing wide without cover in midfield 4-5Ls away, stayed on well final 300M to claim 2nd just before line.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(5W3W3W) 居中間位置，落後四至五個馬位，走外疊，沒有遮擋。最後三百米保持佳勢，僅於過終點前取得亞軍。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W1W) Away with them, raced prominently, 2 wide, allowed rival to cross 800M, found rail 600M, 2 lengths back turning in, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W1W) 與對手同步出閘，居前列，走第二疊。八百米處讓對手過頭。六百米處移入內欄。入直路時落後兩個馬位。直路早段保持佳勢。一百五十米處未能再增速，其後轉弱。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Settled on rail in rear of midfield, came under pressure to hold place inside the 600M, ran home one-paced.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 居中間之後位置，走內欄。六百米處受催策以保持位置。保持同速至終點。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (2W2W2W) Bumped out of stalls, tracked leaders, pushed along final bend to chase leaders, stayed on steadily.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘時發生碰撞，跟隨領先馬匹。直路彎受推策，追趕領先馬匹。末段保持穩勢。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W3W4W) Waited with towards rear, pushed along wide into home straight, lacked pace to reach leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W3W4W) 居後列，留力候上。入直路時受推策，走外疊。速度不足以追及領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W2W) Fast away, held a prominent position on settling, 4th at 400M, fought hard to the line but wasn't gaining ground on leaders. Raced in restricted room 100M.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W2W) 出閘迅速，居前列位置。四百米處居第四位。末段持續力拼，但未能追近領先馬匹。一百米處在窄位競跑。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W1W) From wide draw taken across behind runners, given a waiting ride towards the rear, kept to the inside on straightening but couldn't quicken enough to challenge leaders.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W1W) 自外檔出閘後在馬群之後切入，居後列，留力候上。入直路時固守內疊，但加速力不足以挑戰領先馬匹。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (2W2W4W) Broke well, tightened just inside the 1100M dropping to 3L 5th, slightly worse onto home bend swinging wide into home straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(2W2W4W) 出閘迅速。跑過千一米處後受緊迫，墮居第五位，落後三個馬位。開始轉直路彎時略為墮後。入直路時移出外疊。末段持續力拼，但未能構成威脅。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Slow; (3W2W2W) Reserved behind midfield, 3-4Ls behind leader turning for home, ran on one paced and didn't get involved in the finish.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 慢步速;(3W2W2W) 留居中間之後位置。入直路時落後領放馬三至四個馬位。末段保持同速，未能躋身爭勝行列。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to slow; (5W3W3W) Dropped back from wide draw, settled towards the rear 5Ls back, ran on one-paced in the straight and never looked like winning.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏慢步速;(5W3W3W) 自大外檔出閘，墮居後列，落後五個馬位。直路上保持同速，從未看似有力爭勝。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W3W) Clumsy start losing ground, soon recovered to forward of midfield on rail some 3L off the pace in 5th, angled out for a run entering straight but unable to quicken to threaten, hampered and faded 50M out.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W3W) 出閘笨拙，失地，瞬即恢復走勢，居中間之前第五位，落後領放馬約三個馬位，走內欄。進入直路時向外移出取位，但未能加速以構成威脅。受阻礙，五十米處力竭。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (3W2W) In midfield early stages before moving closer to track leaders entering home turn, driven final 200M and went to the line well. (Jockey - requested to take up a forward position from wide draw.)
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(3W2W) 早段居中間位置。入直路彎時追近，跟隨領先馬匹。最後二百米受催策。末段衝刺良佳。（騎師表示，他獲指示讓自外檔出閘的坐騎佔取前列位置。）

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good; (1W1W) Soon dropped to last few, saved ground turning in for home, ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等步速;(1W1W) 瞬即墮居最後數位之內。入直路時走內疊節省腳程。直路上穩步上前。以末段最為接近。

runnerrecords.comments_eng: Pace Good to fast; Tracked leaders, tended to hang right throughout, faded final 100m.
runnerrecords.comments_chi: 中等偏快步速;跟隨領先馬匹。沿途傾向內閃。最後一百米力竭。
